Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra admission is now open for the UG, PG, Diploma, and Certificate courses for the 2025 batch. Interested candidates can apply online through the official website.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: DBRA University Agra, Agra University, Bhim Rao University

faqs.question: What are the course fees for the MBA at DBRAU Agra?
faqs.answer: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra Master of Business Administrative (MBA) total tuition fee is INR 1.3 lakh (for 1 year-3 years). The students must qualify for the UPCET entrance exam to apply for admission to the MBA course at Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra. DBRAU MBA course is offered for a duration of one to three years. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility criteria to be able to apply for the course. The MBA eligibility criteria is that the candidate must have a bachelors degree with a minimum of 50% in aggregate.

college_info.intro:
DBRA University Agra, through its constituent colleges, affiliated colleges, campus colleges, and departments, offers various UG and PG courses. At the UG level, DBRA University Agra offers BA LLB, BSc, BA, BCom, BBA, BE/ BTech and BPharm courses. Whereas, at the PG level, the university offers the MA, MSc, MCom, MTech, and MBA courses.
MBA and BSc courses offered at DBRA University Agra are really popular among students. DBRAU Agra offers the BSc course in various specialisations such as Botany, Zoology, Chemistry, Mathematics, Physics, and Geology, etc. The university offers admission to BSc based on score of the candidates in Class 12 examination. Through its Department of Business Management, Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra offers the MBA programme. It is a two-year, full-time programme that consists of four semesters. The university accepts the scores of the CUET-PG exam for admission to its MBA programme. The various specialisations offered in the Agra University MBA course include:
Candidates can check some of the popular programmes offered at Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra in the following table:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra offers at the UG, PG, PG diploma, and doctoral courses on campus and affiliated colleges. It is affiliated with fourteen government colleges, twenty seven aided colleges, and 540 self-financed colleges. DBRAU courses are offered through four campuses, namely DBRAU Khandari, DBRAU Paliwal Park, DBRAU Civil Lines, and DBRAU Chhalesar, across various fields such as Humanities, Science, Technology, Engineering, Management, etc. Around 2,724 academic programmes are being operated on the campus. Currently, are studying in affiliated colleges, while about in the university’s hostels. Candidates can check the along with Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra eligibility criteria and DBRAU fees in the following table:

faqs.answer: A:    DBRAU B.E is an undegraduate degree programme in the stream of engineering. It is considered equivalent to a BTech degree. To be eligible to pursue a Bachelor of Engineering (B.E) programme at DBRAU, candidates must have passed Class 12 with relevant Science subjects. However, the admission is not based on Class 12 merit. It is based on CUET UG or JEE Main scores, followed by UPTAC counselling. In case a candidate fails to secure a seat for a B.E at DBRAU, they can pursue a B.E/BTech at other universities or institutes. They can also check out the colleges offering online BTech courses.
faqs.question: I've scored less than 50% in 12th boards, can I get admission in DBRAU for B.E?

faqs.answer: A:    DBRAU Agra BTech total fees 2025 can cost anywhere between INR 1.65 Lakh to INR 2.8 lakh. It includes tuition fees, hostel fees and admission charges. Students also pay a one-time fee of INR 8,000. Please note that fees are subject to changes. Please refer to the official website, whenever in doubt.
faqs.question: What is the total BTech fee at DBRAU Agra for 2025?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The overall experience is very good. Gaining good quality knowledge and experience.

review_content.Placements: There are 65 percent of students placed from our course. The average package is 3 LPA- 4 LPA. The lowest is nothing in our college, but the highest package is 12 LPA. There is a local company, and some MNCs come to this college. Internships are not available in college. Some students are off-campus interns. Roles offered are Java developer, web developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a very friendly environment in our college, but the college canteen and park are some issues, our classroom and labs are very comfortable, so we do not have any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys, so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel, some information is that the environment is picturesque.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college and its infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: All the students get placed depending on what they are doing. If they study up to MD, they will surely earn in lakhs per month. All the students who passed the university exam in the 4th year got internships, and those who passed the university exam got almost a 10k stipend per month. My college is offering a BHMS degree, and there is a hospital also in my college for patients, which is almost free in medicine and consultation because it's government-run.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is almost good, but there is no Wi-Fi and no air conditioning. However, there is a lot of greenery and a quiet, healthy environment. There are separate boys' and girls' hostels, and the hostel is shared, but the cleanliness is very poor in the girls' hostel. I don't know about the boys' hostel, but in the girls' hostel, dogs are roaming around, and the bathroom is also not cleaned regularly. The canteen is also not so good, and there are no sports or games in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college because of the good learning skills and helpful faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average. This college gives average placement. Few companies come and give low salary packages, but not according to the skills of students. The college does not provide internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has good infrastructure and good facilities. It consists of Wi-Fi labs with 2 labs having the maximum number of computers. It has a good mess (canteen). Air-conditioned classrooms are available in this college. It is an above-average college and good for skills development.
review_content.Faculty: This college has helpful teachers. They provide all the knowledge to students. This course is properly computer-based, so teachers provide good lab assessments to students and give quality education. Semester exams are very easy to pass, and out of 10 questions, we have to attempt only 5 questions.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Voc.) in Computer Application - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: There are a lot of students in single classroom.

review_content.Placements: Students had atleast minimum 75% marks in class 12 to be placed in course. No package was offered from this course. No companies were recruiting for this course. Zero percent of students got internship from this course. No job roles were offered from this course to any student.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities were very bad. Infrastructure was bad but computer lab was too good. Except for the computer lab, all labs had old instruments. Students did not like to attend other lab sessions except for the computer lab. I don't know about hostel facilities because I didn't get a hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is very helpful for us, and it secures my future.

review_content.Placements: 65% of students are placed in our course. The average package is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. The lowest is nothing in our college but the highest package goes to 12 LPA. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: This is my journey of my college, not a review.

review_content.Placements: My batch is 2023–2026 in Bachelor of Computer. Decent percentage of students are placed from the college. The highest package is 15 LPA and the average package is 3 to 4 LPA. MNC or IT companies come to lower college. Internships are provided, but students are mostly placed in our college, not in popular companies. Coding roles are the top roles in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nice environment in our college, especially the library and labs. I am a local guy, so I can’t take hostel or anything, but the T3 canteen is very suitable and open in nature. Food is awesome and tasty. The medical facility is very good. I went to check my body weight and the staff calculated my BMI. The staff is ordinary.

admission_process.title: DBRAU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra admission process details are mentioned below:

Students are selected for counselling basis CUET score. Admission to a particular University will depend on CUET Rank. The counselling process is online. BRAU CUET counselling includes various important points:
Before appearing for the CUET for admission to BRAU UG programs, Students should follow these points:
Students should take CUET 2025 only in subjects they have passed in Class 12.
To become eligible for admission through CUET 2025, students should pass the Class 12 exam.
National Testing Agency organizes CUET UG 2025 exam.
CUET 2025 exam includes three sections with MCQs. The syllabus is based on Class 12 NCERT syllabus.
Students appearing for CUET 2025 can choose from a total of 13 languages including Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Gujarati, Odiya, Bengali, Assamese, Punjabi, English, Hindi and Urdu.

courses_data.name: DBRAU BTech 2025 Admission
courses_data.description: The Engineering Institute of Technology at DBRAU's Khandari campus gives a BTech program with three specializations. Admission to this BTech program for the 2024 intake is decided by scores from CUET or JEE Mains. The Bachelor of Engineering (BE) is an undergraduate academic degree in the field of engineering, and DBRAU (Dr Bhim Rao Ambedkar University), situated in Uttar Pradesh, India, gives BE with specializations encompassing disciplines like Mechanical, Electronic Communication Engineering, and Computer Science Engineering.

faqs.question: I've scored less than 50% in 12th boards, can I get admission in DBRAU for B.E?
faqs.answer: DBRAU B.E is an undegraduate degree programme in the stream of engineering. It is considered equivalent to a BTech degree. To be eligible to pursue a Bachelor of Engineering (B.E) programme at DBRAU, candidates must have passed Class 12 with relevant Science subjects. However, the admission is not based on Class 12 merit. It is based on CUET UG or JEE Main scores, followed by UPTAC counselling. In case a candidate fails to secure a seat for aB.E at DBRAU, they can pursue a B.E/BTech at other uni

courses_data.name: DBRAU MA 2025 Admission
courses_data.description: Dr. Bhim Rao Ambedkar University offers MA for two-years. The university offers MA in 12 specialisations at the campus and via its affiliated colleges. Candidates are selected for MA based on their merit. Aspirants who have completed their UG degree with at least 45% aggregate can apply for MA.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission for M.A in DBRAU?
faqs.answer: DBRAU offers MA as a two-year postgraduate programme offered in the full-time mode. To get admission to the MA course at DBRAU, students need to fulfill eligibility criteria. A candidate scoring a minimum of 45% in graduation is eligible to apply for MA admission at the university. Hence, a candidate scoring less that 50% in their graduation degree can apply for the programme. Candidates scoring less than 45% in graduation can check out other colleges offeringonline MA courses.

placement_data.title: DBRAU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year and UG 4-year DBRAU placements 2023 stood at INR 1.8 LPA and INR 3.86 LPA , respectively. Other than this, the median package offered during DBRAU PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.8 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively.
DBRAU Placements 2023

data: DBRAU Placements 2023 A rise of 9% was witnessed in the UG 3-year median package offered in 2023 as compared with 2022 There was a rise of nearly 18% in the UG 4-year median package offered in 2023 as compared with 2022 A rise of nearly 43% was witnessed in the PG 2-year median package offered in 2023 as compared with 2022

faqs.answer: DBRAU Agra is a public University and its MBA degree holds importance in the corporate world. Further, as per DBRAU NIRF report 2024, the key highlights of DBRAU PG 2-year (including MBA program) placements over the past three years are presented below: Particulars PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2021) PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2022) PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2023) Media package INR 3.2 LPA INR 4.2 LPA INR 6 LPA Total students 467 503 562 Students placed 168 145 185 Students opted for higher studies 15 14 22

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during DBRAU Agra placements?
faqs.answer: DBRAU Agra highest package data is not released. However, according to DBRAU overall NIRF report 2024, the course-wise median package offered over the past three years during DBRAU placements is presented below: Course UG 3-year Placement Statistics (2021) UG 3-year Placement Statistics (2022) UG 3-year Placement Statistics (2023) UG 3-year INR 1.5 LPA INR 1.65 LPA INR 1.8 LPA UG 4-year INR 3.2 LPA INR 3.28 LPA INR 3.86 LPA PG 1-year INR 1.5 LPA INR 2.1 LPA INR 1.8 LPA PG 2-year INR 3.2 LPA INR 4.2 LPA INR 6 LPA

faqs.question: With increasing admission intake at DBRAU Agra, how will it impact the placements for outstation students, considering the cost and ROI?
faqs.answer: Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra has consistently witnessed good placement numbers. As per the Shiksha verified reviews the 65% to 85% of the students were placed in UG course . The highest package is INR 15-20 LPA , the average package is INR 6-7 LPA and the lowest package is INR 2-3 LPA . The top recruiters included Infosys, Tata Motors, Sonalika, Wipro, Tech, HCL, BHEL, and others. The increased admission intake has not affected the ROI of the university. In 2023, the median package stood at INR 6 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: What are the course fees for the MBA at DBRAU Agra?
faqs.answer: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra Master of Business Administrative (MBA) total tuition fee is INR 1.3 lakh (for 1 year-3 years). The students must qualify for the UPCET entrance exam to apply for admission to the MBA course at Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra. DBRAU MBA course is offered for a duration of one to three years. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility criteria to be able to apply for the course. The MBA eligibility criteria is that the candidate must have a bachelors degree with a minimum of 50% in aggregate.

faqs.question: What is the total BTech fee at DBRAU Agra for 2025?
faqs.answer: DBRAU Agra BTech total fees 2025 can cost anywhere between INR 1.65 Lakh to INR 2.8 lakh . It includes tuition fees, hostel fees and admission charges. Students also pay a one-time fee of INR 8,000. Please note that fees are subject to changes. Please refer to the official website, whenever in doubt.

faqs.question: What are the additional costs, such as accommodation, food, and books to be paid at DBRAU Agra?
faqs.answer: In addition to the basic course fee , students will have to pay the examination fee and annual fee. The other additional costs include hostel charges, mess charges, and others. Students must duly pay all fee before the last date to avoid the late charges. Also, the seats will be confirmed only when the students pay the DBRAU Agra course fee in full.

description: DBRAU Agra cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BE/BTech course across multiple specialisations. The cutoff is provided as opening and closing ranks for different categories under the Home State quota. Candidates can refer to the sections below to view Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar University (DBRAU), Agra UPTAC cutoff 2025 across different rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

DBRAU JEE Main Cutoff 2026 will be available after the results get announced. Until then students can refer to the table below to see the DBRAU JEE Main Cutoff 2024 for BE, which was concluded after several rounds of the Seat Allotment Result. According to the DBRAU BTech cutoff 2024, the Round 1 closing ranks for B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 327178, for B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, the cutoff was at 559203 and for B.E. in Mechanical Engineering at 1352

DBRAU BE Cutoff 2024 was based on candidates' performance in the JEE Mains, followed by counselling. The cutoff has been concluded for different categories under the HS Quota. BE in CSE was the toughest course of all, as per their last-round cutoff. As per JEE Main cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank stood at 520157 for the BE in Computer Science & Engineering course, for the General HS quota candidates. For 2023 and 2022, DBRAU's last round closing cutoff for BE in Computer Science &am

Tabulated below are the dates for registration, exam, etc. Students can refer to the table below to see the DBRAU JEE Main Important Dates for admission to this university for the academic year 2026-27.

DBRAU NEET Cutoff 2025 is valid for admission to the Bachelor of Dental Surgery BDS course. Students can refer to the table below to know the NEET cutoff for 2024, and previous years. According to the table below, we can say that the cutoff for admission was 926018 in Round 4 closing ranks for the General HS category students.

As per the DBRAU cutoff 2024, the closing rank of BDS course admission was 926018 for the General HS candidates. For admission to the BDS course, Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar University accepts the NEET PG entrance examination cutoff ranks. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff for 2024, 2023 and 2022.

Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to the BDS course via the NEET entrance examination. Candidates can also download this timeline as a PDF file for later reference.

DBRAU CUET PG Cutoff 2025 is valid for admission to the MCA programme. Students can look at the table below to know the first round and last round closing ranks for 2024 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota.

DBRAU CUET PG Cutoff 2024 can be seen in the table given below for different rounds. The 2024 cutoff for the General Home State female category was 10365 in the first and last round for admission to the MCA course. For the General HS category, the cutoff for the same course was 12843 in the last round closing cutoff. More details can be seen in the table below by using the filters provided.

Students can look at the table below to know the important dates for admission at DBRAU for its MCA course via the CUET PG entrance examination. Students also have the option to download these dates as a PDF file for later use.

DBRAU NEET PG Cutoff 2025 is out till Round 2 for candidates seeking admission to this university for its MD courses. According to the DBRAU MDS Cutoff 2025, the cutoffs fell in the ranges of 2725 to 76466 for the General AI category candidates. Among all the most competitive course for admission was MD in General Medicine, followed by MD in Psychiatry, with the closing cutoff being 2725 and 7524, respectively.
In this section, students can see the Dr. Bhimrao Ambedkar University Agra NEET PG Counselling Rounds for 2025, 2024, as well as for 2023. The cutoff lists are presented round and year-wise.

DBRAU UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to the BE courses. For the General category candidates under the All India quota, the cutoff ranged from 690231 to 2017774, wherein BE in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the toughest course for admission. On the other hand, BE in Electrical Engineering was relatively easier for admission. Students can refer to to the table below to know the cutoff for the Round 6 and Last Round for the General AI category.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari CampusReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The overall experience is very good. Gaining good quality knowledge and experience.
reviews.review_text: There is a very friendly environment in our college, but the college canteen and park are some issues, our classroom and labs are very comfortable, so we do not have any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys, so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel, some information is that the environment is picturesque.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by State Pt. J.L.N. Homeo. Medical CollegeReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college and its infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is almost good, but there is no Wi-Fi and no air conditioning. However, there is a lot of greenery and a quiet, healthy environment. There are separate boys' and girls' hostels, and the hostel is shared, but the cleanliness is very poor in the girls' hostel. I don't know about the boys' hostel, but in the girls' hostel, dogs are roaming around, and the bathroom is also not cleaned regularly. The canteen is also not so good, and there are no sports or games in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari CampusReviewed on 11 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of the good learning skills and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It has good infrastructure and good facilities. It consists of Wi-Fi labs with 2 labs having the maximum number of computers. It has a good mess (canteen). Air-conditioned classrooms are available in this college. It is an above-average college and good for skills development.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari CampusReviewed on 29 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: There are a lot of students in single classroom.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were very bad. Infrastructure was bad but computer lab was too good. Except for the computer lab, all labs had old instruments. Students did not like to attend other lab sessions except for the computer lab. I don't know about hostel facilities because I didn't get a hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari CampusReviewed on 28 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is very helpful for us, and it secures my future.
reviews.review_text: There is very friendly environment in our college. But the college canteen and park are some issues. Our classroom or labs are very comfortable so we are not having any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel some information is that the environment is peaceful.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari CampusReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is my journey of my college, not a review.
reviews.review_text: Nice environment in our college, especially the library and labs. I am a local guy, so I can’t take hostel or anything, but the T3 canteen is very suitable and open in nature. Food is awesome and tasty. The medical facility is very good. I went to check my body weight and the staff calculated my BMI. The staff is ordinary.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by St. John's College, AgraReviewed on 3 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college, but it does not offer the highest package placements.
reviews.review_text: My course department has decent infrastructure. We have Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library, and everything works fine. There are no hostel facilities provided inside this college. All basic medical facilities are available. We have proper grounds for outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St. John's College, AgraReviewed on 5 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Placement is not guaranteed, but faculty is good, not bad.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good but not bad. Outside the college, there are many shops you can check. Sports and games are also very good. The college and hostel are strictly focused on studies. Classrooms are good according to experience, and the library is fabulous. Go and see.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by R.B.S CollegeReviewed on 4 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: There is a very good environment and the campus is very big, so you won't regret taking admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very suitable for students. There is a lab with around 30 computers in it. Wi-Fi and camera in every classroom, a fingerprint scanning attendance system.

reviews.review_heading: My experience is very bad at this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were very basic with hygienic water. The college campus was very dirty and dusty. There were no full water facilities. Wi-Fi was not available. No labs, canteen, medical facilities, sports, or games facilities were available. The college campus was very basic with no additional facilities provided. The college location was very out of town with no convenient way to reach.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari CampusReviewed on 16 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: In a simple word, my college is good for student which belongs to a middle class family.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college is decent. It has all the facilities that are required for the study like Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, smartrooms, and library. One more important thing is that my college provides timely awareness of all the requirements for being a good student or a good person, and they always support.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by S.K.S. Ayurvedic Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 7 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is fine, it could become better in terms of everything.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent. Wi-Fi doesn't work there, and neither does the network. Hostels are good, but the food provided by the mess is not so good, it could be healthier. The canteen is just fine. The medical facilities are good, as it is a medical college. There are no such events like sports and games, only 2-3 times a year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by R.B.S CollegeReviewed on 2 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the crowd.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very old infrastructure for the arts faculty, and the rest of the college is good. We need to work a lot on the infrastructure of the college. The infrastructure is good for some departments, like the Engineering and Commerce department classes, which are very old, and everything is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr. M.P.S.Memorial College of Business StudiesReviewed on 28 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for graduation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, and maintenance is also moderate. However, classrooms need maintenance. Hostels are not present there, but they are regularly working on improvements to the infrastructure. I think, in the future, they will make good changes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari CampusReviewed on 19 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of IET College Khandari Agra.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, not very vast. There are 2 playgrounds where outside players play all day, so very rarely do you get a free ground. The hostel is only for girls. Boys have to stay near the college on room rent or in PG hostels, or they can also stay in private boys’ hostels.

review_summary.college_name: RTC Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has a decent infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: I am from the 2024 batch, and my course is B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering. Approximately 50% of students are placed. The lowest package is 2 LPA, and the highest package is 5 LPA. The recruiting companies visited till now are Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Tata Steel Limited, Intellipat, Mjunction, and Cozezin. Approximately 5% of students have secured internships. The specific roles offered vary depending on the recruiting company and the student's skill set.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, but the labs are not maintained properly with the best computers. The classrooms are good and ventilated. The library has 17,000 books, along with national and international journals and magazines. Separate hostels are available for boys and girls. The quality of the canteen is good according to the price, but not so hygienic. No such sports or games are appreciated.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: If you want a good college in Ranchi, then RTC is best for it.

content.Placements: The placement in RTC for the Diploma in Mechanical branch offers a minimum package of 2 LPA, with the highest package reaching 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies include Hitachi, TCS, etc. In my batch, most students received machine operator designations. Over 50 percent of students were placed from our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent, but the hostel and mess facilities are not acceptable. I personally recommend choosing a PG instead of the hostel and mess, as the food quality is poor. However, the canteen food is acceptable. Sports and games are held regularly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Happy to get admission, satisfied with the college, infrastructure, and course curriculum.

content.Placements: 50% of the students get placed. The highest package is 7 lacs per annum, and the lowest is 2.5 lacs per annum. Companies like Tech Mahindra, Nathcorp, and TCS recruit from here. 15 students got internships from Codezeal Private Limited. Roles offered include web development and data science. Top roles for students include data analyst, data scientist, web developer, and application developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good and fascinating, with almost every possible facility available. Wi-Fi is available across the whole campus. Classrooms have a capacity of 60 students, and the library also has good infrastructure. The hostel facility is good, with continuous electricity, Wi-Fi, and four meals a day. There are sports facilities like cricket, football, basketball, and volleyball courts.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Don't take admission in this college.

content.Placements: The highest package is 3.8 lacs, and the average is 2.3 lacs. Top companies didn't come to this college. I didn't get any student internships in this course. So do not take admission in this college and their faculty members didn't give internal marks to students.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel management is not good. They do not cook food properly. Sometimes they give leftover food to the hostel students. Sometimes reptiles are also found in the food. They do not give a locker to the hosteler and do give a study table, so do not take a hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is average. But you can get a degree in less money .

content.Placements: The percent of students who were placed in our course is 50%. The highest package is 11 LPA and the lowest is INR 3 LPA. Infosys is one of the top recruiting companies for our course. 40% of students gain internships through our course and in our company. 75% attendance and assignments are compulsory.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not so good. Wi-Fi is available on campus but the speed of the Wi-Fi is very slow. The classroom is quite good, but the library is excellent. Books are available in the library. The hostel has good Wi-Fi available. The quality of the food is good. There are no sports or games available.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college was satisfactory. Wi-Fi was available for students. Labs like Chemistry Physics electrician, etc. Were available in our college. Classrooms were of good condition. Library was available. Good quality of food was available in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers and good infrastructure of this college.
reviews.review_text: I was satisfied with facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. Labs and classrooms were good. The library was available. Many books were available in the library. The hostel facilities were good. The quality of food in the mess and canteen was good. Medical facilities were available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides almost all kinds of basic and modern facilities for students. Wi-Fi facility is available 24X7. Labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are comfortable. The library is well-maintained. Our college provides 2 different campuses for students. The electricity facility is available 24X7. The food served in the mess is good. The canteen is equipped with air-conditioners. The food served in the canteen is good. Our college organises sports and games activities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available in our college with good internet speed. Labs were good in condition. Classes were in good condition. The library was very decent. It had all the course-related books. The hostel facility was satisfactory with decent mess and canteen. Our college provided good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for bright future.
reviews.review_text: Our college was situated on the bank of a beautiful river surrounded by serene beauty. Our campus included 2 separate hostels for boys and girls with secure and safe facilities. It provided 24X7 electricity, Wi-Fi, and a fully air-conditioned canteen with quality food. Medical facilities were very good. All the games were available. There were big grounds, a basketball court, a volleyball court, an open-air gym, etc. Labs and workshop facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements. Teachers were of helping in nature.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library all were good for our course.
Hostel facility was average but food in the mess and canteen was above average.
There's not much opportunity in sports its just for entertainment, only basketball and volleyball court are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good and reliable for graduation.
reviews.review_text: In our college many facilities are available just like books are well organised and arranged in library and all the branches books are separately arranged in organised manner so that students get books in less period of time. Wi-Fi is also available in academic block. Mess and canteen are cleaned and hygienic. Various sports activities are done according to college calander.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty members, good placements for batch 2019.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is too big. It includes more building for secondary college and college for other programs. The campus includes the athlete running track and football ground, a basketball court which is the most loved part of the campus. The staff and teachers are very cooperative and friendly in nature. Hostel is also well maintained, the food served here is also good and hygienic.

college_info.intro:
BTech and BSc are the most popular programmes at Suresh Gyan Vihar University Jaipur. By doing BTech in Electrical Engineering from SGVU Jaipur, students will be able to apply the knowledge of mathematics, science, engineering fundamentals etc. Students will also be able to design the solutions of difficult engineering problems. Suresh Gyan Vihar University has more than 10 schools of study, like the School of Engineering & Technology, the School of Agriculture, and the International School of Business Management. At the UG level, the university gives BTech, BSc, BPharm and many other courses.
At the PG level, the university gives MBA, MTech, MA, MEd, MCom, and other courses. IBM, Maruti Suzuki, Google, and Huawei are among the popular MBA recruiters at the university.
Below are some of the most popular Suresh Gyan Vihar University courses and their selection criteria:

Spread over and area of 32 acres this university offers courses in diverse fields of course including in management. It offers 6 specializations for its MBA program. It has got quit a good faculty and it also boasts of 80% and more placements. It accepts about 60 students in each of these 6 specializations. While doing there MBA the students can select amongst a plethora of electives. Almost 30 different electives are available to students to choose from during their course. faqs.answer: A:    The admission criteria for entry into Suresh Gyan Vihar University, MBA, are very simple and elementary. The students who have been seeking admission to an MBA are supposed to have at least scored 50% marks in aggregate in the Class 12 examination conducted by a recognised board or university. Further concession of 5% is given to those candidates who belong to SC or ST categories. After fulfilling this eligibility requirement, the students can sign up for admission by paying a nominal amount of INR 500 as the registration fee, after which they have to appear for the entrance examination conducted by the university, known as SGVUEE. This university also accepts the ranking of the students who have appeared for the CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT, GMAT, etc., based on their registration with the university and performance in any of the nationally conducted entrance exams for MBA, declared by the university on its website, shortlisted candidates will be called for a personal interview. Based on the personal interview, selection for the course of MBA is informed to the students.

Students seeking admission to any institution normally check the all India ranking all the state ranking of that institution and then only apply for admission. In the case of SGVU, this ranking is quite good including NIRF ranking. As a result of this, more candidates apply for admission and as a consequence of this the closing ranks increases. In such situations the particular institute invariably announces a cut off below which students cannot apply. But in the case of this private University in Jaipur, there is no mention of any such cutoff on their official website and therefore we must take it as authentic. course_faqs.answer: The BA course at Suresh Gyan Vihar University follows the semester pattern. There are two semesters in an academic year, and therefore systematic learning and assessments are smoothly run throughout. overview_faqs.question: What are people's opinions on Suresh Gyan Vihar University for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, The Suresh Gyan Vihar University located in Jaipur, came into existence in the year 2008. But it traces its origin to Gyan Vihar School that came into existence way back in the year 1994. This university has quite a good reputation in the market or in the academic circles as well. The Pioneer awarded this university ranking of Five Stars amongst the private universities across India. Even otherwise it has obtained or ranking of 71 out of 171 institutions across India by a private agency while NIRF has ranked it in a band of 151 to 200. This university located in Jaipur is famous for combining the best culture of our country in ethics and whatever is followed by our culture and philosophy to teach students about business administration. All in all one can see that people talk very highly about the way this university conducts its business that is its teaching to the students. Best wishes to you.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is a very good option for those whose budget is low and who belong to Bihar.

content.Placements: 80 to 90 percent of students were placed this year. The placement range of each department is very good, and almost all of them are placed. The pharmacy departments placement range is better than other departments, and the placement range of HMCT is also good.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure is available for each departments students, and facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are also available. Single bedrooms, double bedrooms and 5 seater bedrooms are also available. Good quality food is available in both the mess and the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: BCA Google Cloud Program (GCP) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good because of the faculty, good environment, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: I am a student of Suresh Gyan Vihar University pursuing BCA with Google Cloud. Many companies offer to those students who have the highest score ranking. SGVU is a private university located in Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. It was established in 2008, under the Suresh Gyan Vihar University, Jaipur, ACT 2008, ACT No. 16 of 2008. The parent institution dates back further originally, the system started under a body called Sahitya Sadawart Samiti (set up in 1938), and before becoming a university, had legacy schools & colleges. SGVU is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and has approval from the organization.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good course, faculty members, and campus. Library is good but placements are awful.

content.Placements: Suresh Gyan Vihar provided good options for placement but they were not relevant at the time. Still, students from my batch got placed at good companies. The average package was 4 LPA. Top company at my time was Metacube. I suggest working on your LinkedIn instead of relying on college placements.
content.Infrastructure: Library was top-notch with all amenities. Hostels were divided into levels. Level 1 had good rooms and Wi-Fi. The food at mess was actually good. Warden was overall well managed. The girls hostel safety was at its best. It may feel expensive as per the rooms they provided.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: One thing I love about is the peaceful environment over here.

content.Placements: I great place where you can be hire by the top recruiters. Many seniors are there who have been selected because of their dedication towards the field. Package depends on the interview sessions on an average it is 4lpa. Internship opportunities come from government labs.
content.Infrastructure: We have excellent library, full network Wi-Fi, interactive classrooms, well-equipped labs. In hostel it will like home. Well cooked food, safe drinking water, access to gym, ground for various sports. There is also activity area helps to focus on your hobbies.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com) in Accountancy - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Jaipur.

content.Placements: I remember when I was pursuing an M.Com from this university, almost 60% of students got placements with the highest package of 6 LPA. Many students got internship opportunities from multinational companies. I pursued M.Com online from this university.
content.Infrastructure: I visited the university campus once. The infrastructure of the university is large, good, and vibrant. The SGVU library contains a number of books, and I hear it is the largest library among universities. The whole campus is covered with greenery. The SGVU campus is too good for pursuing our degree.

admission_process.title: Suresh Gyan Vihar University Admissions Process 2025

paragraphs: The Suresh Gyan Vihar University admissionsare open and based on the merit and the entrance exam. TheUniversityconducts its entrance exam named SGVUEE. The registration process for the entrance exam is conducted online.
Interested candidates can check the below table forSuresh Gyan Vihar University course eligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
A pass in Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate

Class 12 examination with at least 50% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category) with English, Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects, along with one of the following subjects: Biology/ Mathematics
A pass in Class 12 with at least 55% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category)
SGVUEE/CLAT
Passed Class 12 with Science (English, Physics, Chemistry, Maths/ Biology)
Class 12 with Agriculture with minimum 60% aggregate (5% relaxation in case of SC/ ST category)

A pass in a recognised Bachelor’s degree of minimum 3 years duration with mathematics at Class 12 level or at Graduate level and obtained at least 50 % (45 % in the case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying degree examinations
Confirmation of Seat Allotment
To confirm the seat allotment candidates have to pay the admission fee as provided in the admission certificate.
lists: Register as a new user and enter your basic details.
Pay the fee with a credit card/debit card or net banking and submit it.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Suresh Gyan Vihar University - SGVU?
faqs.answer: To apply offline for Suresh Gyan Vihar University Entrance Exam (SGVUEE), the process is as follows: Duly filled application should be sent by registered post to “Director (Admissions), Suresh Gyan Vihar University, Mahal, Jagatpura, Jaipur (Rajasthan)-302017” along with the required documents & application form fee of Rs 500/- which may be paid through debit card/credit card/net banking (visit gyanvihar.org/online- fee)/DD drawn in favor of “Suresh Gyan Vihar University” payable at Jaipur or manually at Finance department of SGVU.In case of DD, mention the application form number at the back of the DD.In case of other modes of payment (debit card/credit card/net banking), mention transaction ID at the last page of the application form.Candidate will be informed regarding the Student ID (SID) and password through e- mail or SMS or both, after receiving the application. Eligibility rules as specified for each programme shall be strictly followed and shall not be relaxed under any circum

faqs.question: Does Suresh Gyan Vihar University - SGVU conduct GD/PI as part of its admission process?
faqs.answer: Yes, Suresh Gyan Vihar University (SGVU) conducts group discussions and personal interviews as part of its admission process. However, admission to all the Bachelor of Science (Honors) and Bachelor of Science programmes is entrance-based and requires the candidate to appear for an online test. Shortlisted candidates will be called for a group discussion or personal interview round for final selection at Suresh Gyan Vihar University.

faqs.question: What is the minimum marks required for MBA at Suresh Gyan Vihar University 2023?
faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, Suresh Gyan Vihar University in Jaipur accepts scores of many pan India entrance examinations conducted for admissions to MBA besides it's own entrance examination. Students seeking admission to any institution normally check the all India ranking all the state ranking of that institution and then only apply for admission. In the case of SGVU, this ranking is quite good including NIRF ranking. As a result of this, more candidates apply for admission and as a consequence of this the closing ranks increases. In such situations the particular institute invariably announces a cut off below which students cannot apply. But in the case of this private University in Jaipur, there is no mention of any such cutoff on their official website and therefore we must take it as authentic. Be that as it may, a student has to have reasonably good score in any of the common entrance examinations conducted on pan India basis for possibility of getting admission for MBA in this univers

More than 1200 multinational companies participated during the placement session and presented over 13000 jobs to batch 2026. The highest international package secured by the batch 2026 stood at I NR 2 crore per annum, while the national highest package achieved stood at INR 55 LPA . The top recruiters of Suresh Gyan Vihar University in 2026 include Google, Microsoft, Amazon, IBM, Infosys , Samsung, etc.

nirf.description:
SGVU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for SGVU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, SGVU's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, SGVU's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, SGVU climbed 10 ranks to #39 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

hostel_campus.college_name: Suresh Gyan Vihar University Jaipur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Suresh Gyan Vihar University has total of 6 hostels with 4 hostels for boys and 2 for girls. All the hostels are equipped with facilities like- Wi-Fi, free gymnasium and yoga classes, baking facility, indoor and outdoor games, computer lab, hygienic mess services on complimentary basis.

library.description:
Library has subscribed/procured about 1724 online journals through DELNET. The total number of printed holdings are more than One Lakh, including various, books on varied streams, printed journals, and magazines, dissertation of M-Tech scholars and Research thesis of PhD candidates including various fields of Engineering & Technology , ISBM , Pharmacy , BHMCT , Bio Science , Education , Braille Books , Distance Education ,Book Bank , Agriculture. 

The central library is member of ‘Developing Library Network' DELNET (DATABASE services). Users can access various database of about 2 crore books, journals, thesis, non-print materials etc. available with 4697 INDIAN and Foreign library.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Mechanical Lab, Pharmacy Lab

reviews.review_heading: This college is a very good option for those whose budget is low and who belong to Bihar.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is available for each departments students, and facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are also available. Single bedrooms, double bedrooms and 5 seater bedrooms are also available. Good quality food is available in both the mess and the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good because of the faculty, good environment, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities available in the college, like good classrooms and a library system, are good. If you need any help or want to borrow a book, you can. All is going well. SGVU is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and has approval from organizations like All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), professional/sectoral regulators depending on the course (e. g., for Pharmacy, Agriculture, etc. ).

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good course, faculty members, and campus. Library is good but placements are awful.
reviews.review_text: Library was top-notch with all amenities. Hostels were divided into levels. Level 1 had good rooms and Wi-Fi. The food at mess was actually good. Warden was overall well managed. The girls hostel safety was at its best. It may feel expensive as per the rooms they provided.

reviews.review_heading: One thing I love about is the peaceful environment over here.
reviews.review_text: We have excellent library, full network Wi-Fi, interactive classrooms, well-equipped labs. In hostel it will like home. Well cooked food, safe drinking water, access to gym, ground for various sports. There is also activity area helps to focus on your hobbies.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: I visited the university campus once. The infrastructure of the university is large, good, and vibrant. The SGVU library contains a number of books, and I hear it is the largest library among universities. The whole campus is covered with greenery. The SGVU campus is too good for pursuing our degree.

reviews.review_heading: Well-maintained campus with decent placements needs better faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our department was well-equipped with modern classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a dedicated library section for academic support. Hostel facilities were decent with clean rooms,  24/7 water and electricity, and good security. The mess served hygienic food with a fair variety, while the canteen offered snacks and beverages. Basic medical support was available on campus. Sports facilities included grounds for cricket, volleyball, and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Choose your college- Suresh Gyan Vihar University, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good, and a friendly environment is available in the college. College provides all facilities like Wi-Fi connection, library, and sports complex. The quality of food is very tasty and good and different types of food are available. All facilities are provided in mess and medical facilities are available in college and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in the industry.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available in my college. Hostel have boards and mess provide healthy food. Wi-Fi is available in hostels and classrooms are very comfortable. Library is available. They provide fruits and vegetables in the morning.

reviews.review_heading: Great college and wonderful college life towards studies.
reviews.review_text: All kinds of facilities are available here based on what is important to a student for education and their development. Library with all the latest books, computer labs with fast working computer system are available. There is a good environment for hostel students to live in and various stadium for sports based on the different volleyball, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a world of growing opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are outstanding in my course and department. The whole university consists of Wi-Fi, labs, high connectivity network, AC classrooms, and well-maintained systems. Library is very vast and consists of thousands of books. Facilities like elevator and accelerator are available. Hostels are maintained to a very great extent in terms of cleanliness and greenery. The hygienic food is served in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are top tier and on the other hand,...

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for higher education and good for placements.
reviews.review_text: College looks very beautiful and has a big campus area. All rooms are well-decorated and have smart classrooms and labs. The hostel is very good and provides hygienic food. It also provides all resources like laundry, cleaning, etc. The behavior of the hostel staff is good.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing facilities with lush green campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of amenities, beginning from our lecture halls and labs, which are well-equipped. All the systems are also quite fast, digital screens are used at the time of lectures. Rooms are also quite spacious as well as well-ventilated. Wi-Fi network as well as LAN is also provided. Additionally, sports and other curriculum activities are also encouraged, playgrounds are there separately for games such as cricket, basketball, badminton, and much more.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing university with great learnings.
reviews.review_text: Suresh Gyan Vihar University shines with its world-class infrastructure, spacious, well-equipped classroom, and labs provide an ideal learning environment. Hostel facilities are comfortable, secure, and homely. Facilities are perfect. Hostel food is also good and quite hygienic as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great experience.
reviews.review_text: The college has a great infrastructure, with a good amount of invitations and activities, with an event. It is very good, and has a great amount of activities done. It provides a good environment and skills.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great institution.
reviews.review_text: It has a great infrastructure with good water facilities along with breathable rooms. Hostels are newly constructed and good food in mess. It has good paint along with a nice Wi-Fi facility in the rooms and along with fresh RO purified water in the water cooler.

data.description: Yes, Suresh Gyan Vihar University follows the semester pattern for its BTech course. It is a four-year course where the students complete the course work in various disciplines. There are two semesters in an academic year, and therefore systematic learning and assessments smoothly run throughout. This is the structure where the candidates can select subjects from various domains; in subsequent semesters. A semester-wise format offers students the ability to handle workloads in the semesters.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Amrita Institutions Nagercoil are BTech and MTech. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. Some of the specialisations of the BTech course include Computer Science and Engineering, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Automation & Robotics Engineering, and Electronics, and Communication Engineering. Amrita Nagercoil Tamil Nadu courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Amrita Institutions Nagercoil in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Amrita Institution Nagercoil has released the placement data for the year 2025. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Amrita Institution Nagercoil placements 2025 stood at INR 80.4 LPA and INR 9.08 LPA, respectively. Some of the top recruiters that took part in the placement 2025 are TCS, Cognizant, HCL, Wipro, Accenture, IBM, Amazon, etc.

Earlier, the college offered the highest package of INR 56.95 LPA in the placement 2024. More than 300 recruiters visited the institute and the placement percentage recorded was 92%. Candidates can check the key highlights of placement in the table below:

faqs.answer: A:    Amrita Institution Nagercoil concluded the placements for the Class of 2025 with an average package of INR 9.08 LPA. faqs.answer: A:    The institute has disclosed the placement data on its official website. As per the data released, the highest salary offered in Amrita Institution Nagercoil placements 2025 was INR 80.4 LPA, comparatively higher than the amount offered in 2024. The highest package offered in 2024 was INR 56.95 LPA. The average salary 2025 stood at INR 9.08 LPA.
faqs.question: Has the Amrita Institution Nagercoil placement report been released?

faqs.answer: A:    The placement percentage for 2025 is not revealed. Earlier,  92% of the students were placed in 2024 placements. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Amrita Institutions Nagercoil offers courses at UG and PG levels. These courses are offered in streams such as Engineering and Management. Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Nagercoil offers BTech and MTech courses to students. The duration of these courses ranges between 2 and 4 years. faqs.answer: A:    Students need to upload certain documents at the time of AIN admission. Students must ensure the validity of these credentials. Find below the list of documents needed at the time of Amrita Institution Nagercoil admission:Coloured photograph & signatureBirth certificatePassing certificate and qualifying mark sheetEntrance examination scorecardCaste certificate, Category certificate (if applicable)
faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission at Amrita Institution Nagercoil?

faqs.answer: A:    Amrita Institution, Nagercoil admissions for BTech are done on an entrance basis. The institute accepts candidates based on their performance in the Amrita Entrance Examination (AEEE). It is the computer-based entrance test held for Class 12 passed candidates for admission in BTech courses. Admission via AEEE is given in BTech courses. Students can also check AEEE mock test here. However, the institute also reserves a certain amount of seats for those who have a valid JEE Main score. Candidates can visit the institute's website to know more about the same.
faqs.question: Can I join Amrita Institution, Nagercoil without Amrita Entrance Examination?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee differs as per resective courses.  The college offers eight courses in the streams of Engineering and Management. Students can check the table below to know the course-wise total tuition fee from the table presented below:CourseTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 1.5 lakh - INR 3 lakhMTechINR 1 lakhMBAINR 10.5 lakhNote: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change
faqs.question: Is Amrita Institution, Nagercoil expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fees of MBA course is INR 10.5 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also require to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

review_content.Placements: I am from the first batch in our college, which started in 2024 and there are three branches, which are ECE, CSE, AIDS, and on average, we are 400 students, so I do not know about placements and internships in our college. Our college is bigger than some colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: If you want to know about WI-FI, here the Wi-Fi connection is good and better than in some colleges. Classrooms are also good, whereas in the library, there are some rules to follow, but it is neat and quiet.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty is good and they are very knowledgeable and they are also qualified and teaching is also good, but if you know Tamil, it will be good for asking doubts and to communicate with teachers easily. There are several opportunities, like a hackathon for asking doubts.

admission_overview.college_name: Amrita Institution, Nagercoil Course Admission 2026: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Application

admission_process.title: Amrita Institution Nagercoil Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Amrita Institution Nagercoil admission 2026is open. The institute accepts candidates primarily on an entrance basis. Students are offered BTech and MTech at undergraduate and postgraduate levels respectively. Candidates must satisfy the eligibility and selection criteria of the desired programme before applying. The admission process for the institute generally commences online. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other admission-related information forAmrita Institution Nagercoil.

Amrita Institution Nagercoilcourse admissionis subject to clearance of the preset eligibility. Students seeking to get into the UG courses need to have passed Class 12 with relevant subjects from a recognised board. Similarly, for PG admissions students need to have passed graduation in the relevant field from a recognised university, For BTech courses, students need to either appear for the AEEE (Amrita Entrance Examination) or provide a valid JEE Main score. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forAmrita Institution Nagercoil courses:
AEEE|JEE Mains

Amrita Institution, Nagercoil admission processincludes registration and entrance exam scores as per respective courses. Students seeking to get into the course of choice need to fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme. Find below the detailed steps to completeAmrita Institution Nagercoil admission process:
STEP 1: Amrita Institution, Nagercoil Application Process 2026
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students will be selected based on entrance exam scores. For BTech admission, students need to appear either for the - Amrita Entrance Examination – Engineering 2026 or provide a valid score of JEE Main. As for admissions to the MTech course, students are either selected based on their academic merit or can get direct admissions by providing GATE.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What is the BTech selection criteria at Amrita Institution Nagercoil?
faqs.answer: TheBTech selection criteria at Amrita Institution Nagercoilis based on the Amrita Entrance Examination – Engineering 2026 and JEE Mains percentile score. Apart from this, candidates must meet the last educational qualification set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 55% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics separately and an aggregate minimum of 60% in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics.

faqs.question: What are the BTech specialisations offered at Amrita Institutions Nagercoil?
faqs.answer: The specialisations offered for the BTech course at  Amrita Institutions Nagercoil are mentioned below:BTech in Artificial Intelligence and Data ScienceBTech in Computer Science and EngineeringBTech in Electronics and Communication EngineeringBTech in Automation & Robotics EngineeringBTech in Mechanical Robotics Engineering

courses_data.name: Amrita Institution Nagercoil MTech Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Amrita Institution, Nagercoil offers MTech courses at the PG level. A total of 36 seats are available for this course. The MTech courses are offered in two specialisations, namely,Master in CSEand Master's in Manufacturing and Automation. The duration of the course is two years. Candidates who are looking forMTechcourse admission must complete BE/BTech (common eligibility). Students can check more course details below:

faqs.question: Is M.Tech available at Amrita Institution, Nagercoil?
faqs.answer: Yes, M.Tech course is available at Amrita Institution, Nagercoil. Amrita Institution, Nagercoil offers a two-year M.Tech course at the PG level. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass BE/BTech (common eligibility) to apply for the M.Tech course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the M.Tech course at Amrita Institutions Nagercoil?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for the MTech course at Amrita Institutions Nagercoil is that the candidate should have passed BE/BTech (Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Electronics and Instrumentation, Information Science), MCA, M.Sc. Computer Science, MSc IT, M.Sc. Software Engineering.

faqs.question: How to get into Amrita Institution Nagercoil for M.Tech course admission?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission at Amrita Institution Nagercoil for M.Tech course, candidates must meet the last educational qualification set by the institutions. Aspirants should pass BE/BTech (Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics and Communication, Electrical and Electronics, Electronics and Instrumentation, Information Science), MCA, MSc Computer Science, MSc IT, MSc Software Engineering. The selection criteria for the course is based on CEETA PG.

faqs.question: What is the MBA total tuition fee at Amrita Institution, Nagercoil?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees of MBA course is INR 10.5 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also require to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at Amrita Institution, Nagercoil?
faqs.answer: For admission to the MBA course, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. Amrita Institution, Nagercoil accepts a valid score of MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, GMAT/GRE. Apart from this, the total tuition fee for the MBA course is INR 10.5 lakh.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Amrita Institution, Nagercoil?
faqs.answer: To get admission in Amrita Institution Nagercoil, students need to ensure that they satisfy the admission criteria of the desired programme. Eligible students may apply via the institute's official website. The institute shortlists the candidates based on the entrance exam score and PI (for M.Tech admission). To secure one's seat at the institute, students need to pay admission fees.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Amrita Institution Nagercoil?
faqs.answer: Amrita Institution Nagercoil primarily accepts candidates on an entrance basis for both of its offered programmes. However, for M.Tech admissions, those who have a valid GATE score, may directly apply for the programme. Such students may skip the Personal Interview round. For more information, students can visit the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: Can I join Amrita Institution, Nagercoil without Amrita Entrance Examination?
faqs.answer: Amrita Institution, Nagercoil admissions for BTech are done on an entrance basis. The institute accepts candidates based on their performance in the Amrita Entrance Examination (AEEE). It is the computer-based entrance test held for Class 12 passed candidates for admission in BTech courses. Admission via AEEE is given in BTech courses. Students can also checkAEEE mock testhere. However, the institute also reserves a certain amount of seats for those who have a valid JEE Main score. Candidates can visit the institute's website to know more about the same.

faqs.question: Can I join Amrita Institution, Nagercoil without Amrita Entrance Examination?
faqs.answer: No, candidates who are looking for BTech course admission must sit and appear for Amrita Entrance Examination. Amrita Entrance Examination – Engineering (AEEE) is the computer-based entrance test held for Class 12 passed candidates for admission in BTech courses. Admission via AEEE is given in BTech courses. Students can also checkAEEE mock testhere.

placement_data.title: Amrita Institution Nagercoil Overview 2025
paragraphs: As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Amrita Institution Nagercoil placements 2025 stood at INR 80.4 LPA and INR 9.08 LPA , respectively.
In 2024, more than 300 recruiters visited the institute and the placement percentage recorded was 92%. The highest salary offered during 2024 placements was INR 56.95 LPA.

The institute has placement cell which is responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The institute invites the companies of various sectors to conduct the Campus interview process at the Campus premises.

The placement team also utilized the vast network of alumni, the corporate relations departments of sister institutions / other campuses to benefit students. The team improves the quality of placements in terms of job opportunities, relevant companies and the packages they offered to the students.

An Investment Banker is a finance professional who works within an investment bank or a financial institution, specializing in providing financial advisory services and raising capital for corporations, governments, and other entities.

college_info.college_name: Amrita Institution, Nagercoil Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Amrita Institution, Nagercoil awards scholarships to meritorious students and also gives a range of scholarship waivers on the tuition fee to support students' education. All the students applying for admission are automatically considered for scholarships. The scholarships are awarded based on merit, economic need, equal opportunity, and affirmative actions for socially backward groups. Amrita Institution scholarships are offered to students under three criteria given below:

Amrita Institution Nagercil BTech students can apply for scholarships based on their merit. Admissions at Amrita Nagercoil are categorised into 2 categories, i.e. Scholarship and Non-Scholarship. Admission through scholarship is based on AEEE/JEE performance. Further, selection for the Non-Scholarship category is based on Class 12 marks in PCM (Physics, Chemistry & Maths) and one of the entrance examinations (AEEE/JEE) is mandatory to attend.

Apart from this, the college also offers scholarships to students seeking admission to international programmes. Amrita scholarships are offered to students according to their marks and admission interview performance. The criterion for Amrita scholarships is as follows:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College is good; you can definitely try this college. Overall, stars can be 4 for this college.

review_content.Placements: 10–20 percent of students get placed in college. Companies like Capgemini are interested in our students. 30–40 percent of students get internships. I can give a maximum of 4 stars to the college. I think there is no need to explain more about college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, practical labs, classrooms, library and hostels are really good, but infrastructure is not good, and mess food is not good. Canteen food is not that good; medical and sports services are available in college. These facilities are worth two stars.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering(Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: There are many activities and competitions.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% students are placed every year but due to recession this year, low percentage of students have been placed. All students get internship in all the course. The minimum package observed is about 30k to 40k INR per month. Around 70 to 80% students get internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in the college. Wi-fi is present in all the department for students. There are library for students. Hostel is for both boys and girls which is located in the different locations of the campus itself. Sports facilities are also available for the students.
