overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Vishwaniketan’s Institute of Management, Entrepreneurship and Engineering Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Life at Vishwaniketan Institute (ViMEET).

content.Placements: In the last 3 years, more than 500 students have been placed from our course. The highest package provided by our college for our course is 18 LPA. The average package of the college is 3.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 1.5 LPA. There are many recruiting companies like TCS, Adani, Accenture, Tata Motors, Byju's, etc. The college provides internships to 3rd and last-year students. 30-40% of students are placed by the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has decent infrastructure. Hostels are there in the college itself. I don't live in the hostel, but my friends live there. I have visited there a few times. They are clean and well-maintained. There are two types of rooms: AC and Non-AC. They provide a single bed per person. One room accommodates 4 students max. The mess provides good food, which is healthy. The college also provides medical facilities. The college conducts various sports programs, giving students opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering(Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Honest review about the college.

content.Placements: Many companies come to the campus of this college. Companies such as Accenture and Nippon Electrical are part of it, and the director of training and placement helps every student a lot. Also, we get permission to do internships, which the companies provide for us by themselves.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities provided by the hostel are more than imagination; each floor has a Wi-Fi for students and also has water geysers in each and every room or if you are a boy and select the common bathroom, then too, it has 7 bathrooms with geysers, which is more than enough.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is good; you can definitely try this college. Overall, stars can be 4 for this college.

content.Placements: 10–20 percent of students get placed in college. Companies like Capgemini are interested in our students. 30–40 percent of students get internships. I can give a maximum of 4 stars to the college. I think there is no need to explain more about college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, practical labs, classrooms, library and hostels are really good, but infrastructure is not good, and mess food is not good. Canteen food is not that good; medical and sports services are available in college. These facilities are worth two stars.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering(Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: There are many activities and competitions.

content.Placements: Around 70% students are placed every year but due to recession this year, low percentage of students have been placed. All students get internship in all the course. The minimum package observed is about 30k to 40k INR per month. Around 70 to 80% students get internship.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in the college. Wi-fi is present in all the department for students. There are library for students. Hostel is for both boys and girls which is located in the different locations of the campus itself. Sports facilities are also available for the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities are provided.

content.Placements: 70% students are placed every year. But due to the recession this year, low percentage of students have been placed. Students from third year are also allowed for internships cum placements. The minimum package observed is about 30 to 40k INR per month.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in the college. Wi-Fi is present in all the departments for students. There are library and labs too. Library is maintained for students. Hostel is for girls and boys both located in the different locations in the campus itself. Ground, badminton court, basketball court, squash court, volleyball court, etc. are the facilities for sports and games.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Life at Vishwaniketan Institute (ViMEET).
reviews.review_text: The college has decent infrastructure. Hostels are there in the college itself. I don't live in the hostel, but my friends live there. I have visited there a few times. They are clean and well-maintained. There are two types of rooms: AC and Non-AC. They provide a single bed per person. One room accommodates 4 students max. The mess provides good food, which is healthy. The college also provides medical facilities. The college conducts various sports programs, giving students opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review about the college.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities provided by the hostel are more than imagination; each floor has a Wi-Fi for students and also has water geysers in each and every room or if you are a boy and select the common bathroom, then too, it has 7 bathrooms with geysers, which is more than enough.

reviews.review_heading: College is good; you can definitely try this college. Overall, stars can be 4 for this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, practical labs, classrooms, library and hostels are really good, but infrastructure is not good, and mess food is not good. Canteen food is not that good; medical and sports services are available in college. These facilities are worth two stars.

reviews.review_heading: There are many activities and competitions.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in the college. Wi-fi is present in all the department for students. There are library for students. Hostel is for both boys and girls which is located in the different locations of the campus itself. Sports facilities are also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities are provided.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in the college. Wi-Fi is present in all the departments for students. There are library and labs too. Library is maintained for students. Hostel is for girls and boys both located in the different locations in the campus itself. Ground, badminton court, basketball court, squash court, volleyball court, etc. are the facilities for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has high placement rate.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is spacious and well-maintained. Classrooms are well cleaned. Labs and a library are enabled with full of Wi-Fi facilities. Hostel facilities are good but the mess is not up to the mark. Canteen is very good. All the sports grounds are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college. I learn a lot of things form this college.
reviews.review_text: In our department a lot of facilities are there like Wi-Fi, labs with internet access, classrooms with AC and library with decipline. In hostel there are lot of facilities. Like light is 24/7 are available, and decipline is also there. The quality of food is very good and hygienic. In our college medical facilities are also very good and available 24/7. And in our college many activities are taken like sports and various types of games.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the well-mannered staff members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the institute are excellent. The library, classrooms, and labs are all well-maintained and equipped with Wi-Fi. All students living in the hostel are very good. The girls' and boys' hostels are well-kept and have Wi-Fi. The canteen food is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and I would recommend it.
reviews.review_text: It is good in games. All sports are available. All types of grounds are available, like the basketball ground, the football ground, and also the huge cricket ground. It has indoor sports like carrom, tennis, and more. Games are held on sports days.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities and good surroundings.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available, but only on the first floor. It has a range issue or connection issue every time. Computer labs are not available after college hours. Classrooms are available till 9 PM, and the library is available till 11 PM. Hostel food is not good, and every day you will get daal and potatoes. There is no medical facility. You can play sports, but there is no ground facility. Only a basketball court is available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vishwaniketan’s Institute of Management, Entrepreneurship and Engineering Technology.
reviews.review_text: Vishwaniketan's Institute has the best infrastructure and development, and the library has sufficient books for study purposes. Salaries in higher education in Russia are higher, in relation to other comparable occupations, than in the United States.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like labs, hostel, library, etc., are Good in the college. We do have transportation facilities for students who live far. The library of the college is accessible 24 hours for students. A canteen is also available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: None of the students of our batch gets placed in a company.
reviews.review_text: There are enough computer labs and a chemistry lab. They also have Wi-Fi facilities, and classrooms are also good. Girls and boys hostels are very near to our college. The hostel has Wi-Fi facilities, but sometimes its speed is low. The hostel has good bathrooms, but sometimes problems occur due to unavailability of enough water. Quality of food is good, but it is not like our home. There are 2 canteens. There is a ground for basketball, cricket, tennis and some indoor games like chess and carro...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college .
reviews.review_text: According to me the college infrastructure is decent one. The infrastructure is very suitable to the students. Classrooms are good and as per requirement. Library and labs are well maintained. Also college provides canteen facility and canteen are well hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers education at a very low fee.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but only on 1 floor and it also has a range issue or connection issue every time. Computer labs are available but not after college. Classrooms are available till 9 PM, and the library is available till 11 PM. Hostel food is not good, and every day you will get daal and potato. There is no medical facility. You can play sports, but there is no ground facility, only a basketball ground is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, but it is not an autonomous college and doesn’t have a canteen available here.

review_content.Placements: The percent of placed students is 20-30 percent. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Wipro, etc. There isn’t a seating area for students; only the garden is available to sit and relax, but the guards don’t allow sitting in the garden.
review_content.Infrastructure: Anjuman College of Engineering and Technology is a good college, but it is not an autonomous college. We don't have any canteens available here, and no Wi-Fi is available for the classes. The college is okay. My personal rating for the college is 6 out of 10.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Anjuman College honest review, located in Central India.

review_content.Placements: Artificial Intelligence and Data Science are the new branches in my college. So 2024–25 will be the first year of placement for my branch. As long as you see all the other branches in my college, the placements are not too many, and even I am not satisfied with those companies and their packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: If we talk about the infrastructure, for our course, we have a classroom and a lab. The lab is better, it has many computers with Windows 11, Wi-Fi, and even AC to keep the lab cool. But if we talk about the classroom, then it is the worst, uncomfortable desks and benches, no AC or cooler, and even small.

individual_reviews.title: Best college in sadar, Nagpur.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students have been placed in CSE. The highest package in the year 2024 was about 12 LPA, and the average package is around 4 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Mahindra, etc. Around 90% of students get internships in software development, data science, etc.

content.Placements: If I consider out of 100 students, at least 50-60 students get placements, but students must be eligible for placement, as if students don't have the required skills for cracking the interview, they cannot sit in campus placements, and you should maintain a CGPA of at least above 7 for college placement, as the college does not accept students with a lower CGPA.

Top recruiters are TCS, Wipro, etc. There isn’t a seating area for students; only the garden is available to sit and relax, but the guards don’t allow sitting in the garden.
content.Infrastructure: Anjuman College of Engineering and Technology is a good college, but it is not an autonomous college. We don't have any canteens available here, and no Wi-Fi is available for the classes. The college is okay. My personal rating for the college is 6 out of 10.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Anjuman College honest review, located in Central India.

content.Placements: Artificial Intelligence and Data Science are the new branches in my college. So 2024–25 will be the first year of placement for my branch. As long as you see all the other branches in my college, the placements are not too many, and even I am not satisfied with those companies and their packages.
content.Infrastructure: If we talk about the infrastructure, for our course, we have a classroom and a lab. The lab is better, it has many computers with Windows 11, Wi-Fi, and even AC to keep the lab cool. But if we talk about the classroom, then it is the worst, uncomfortable desks and benches, no AC or cooler, and even small.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's an amazing college for the study of Computer Science and Technology.

content.Placements: The placement ratio of our college is very low, and the recent trend in Computer Science is comparatively down because of AI demand. As per my knowledge, the placements of our previous batch were 20 percent. Internships are mostly found on your own. Most students are unemployed. The top roles provided in our batch are consultant and sales marketing.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is decent in the middle of Nagpur city, so the facilities are available very close by. Wi-Fi is present on campus, but only for Computer Science and other minor branches that are related to the Computer Science major course. The number of classrooms is quite exciting. The structural building of the campus is very good. The canteen and food are good, but not very hygienic. Sports and games facilities are limited.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It has decent academic support with a good campus. It needs more practical exposure.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students from the B.Tech course get placed. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course include NGOs, media houses, and educational firms. Around 50% of students got internships in companies like Teach for India, Times Group, and local startups. Common roles offered are content writers, research assistants, and HR trainees.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study materials. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average. The canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage students' recreation. Overall, the infrastructure is decent and supports both academics and student life well.

It helps to understand a student to know about the scene of the interviewing room.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure, Wi-Fi availability, classrooms are good, and proper hygiene is maintained. review_summary.college_name: Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: About Visvesvaraya Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: A total of 81 percent of students got placed in my course. The highest package in my course is 21 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. The top recruitment companies in my course are Microsoft, Google, etc. A total of 91 percent of students got an internship in my course. The top roles offered in the course are the Manager post.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are Wi-Fi, full speed, and 24/7 availability. Labs are very big and well-cleaned and ventilated. Classrooms are also good and clean. A well-stocked library is present with all resources. The quality of facilities in my hostel is acceptable. The quality of food is good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities and sports are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The name of my college is Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: I liked this college, I am doing B.A. here, and I liked the infrastructure here very much. The studies here are also very good, with a lot of internships. I am doing BBA from here, and it has taken me one year to do this course. It is very good to come here, and 60 percent is required for interns.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of our college are very helpful, like giving important notes during exam time or giving experience to interns when they come here. The faculty here is very respectable, sometimes they ask about a topic, and I studied it well in class. Since I came to this college, I have enjoyed studying a lot.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has decent academic support with a good campus. It needs more practical exposure.

content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students from the B.Tech course get placed. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course include NGOs, media houses, and educational firms. Around 50% of students got internships in companies like Teach for India, Times Group, and local startups. Common roles offered are content writers, research assistants, and HR trainees.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study materials. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average. The canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage students' recreation. Overall, the infrastructure is decent and supports both academics and student life well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college, if you are financially not that well.

content.Placements: This is a good college, if you want to grow you can grow here, and professors help in guiding for placements. The job fair was organized last year and many juniors were also given some internships so as to keep on learning and practicing. It helps to understand a student to know about the scene of the interviewing room.
content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure, Wi-Fi availability, classrooms are good, and proper hygiene is maintained. We have two libraries where more than 10 personal computers are there to learn and search things. High-speed internet is there all around the campus which is easily accessible.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review in the Shiksha by Rishabh Kaushik.

content.Placements: More than 90% of students got placed in top companies. The highest package offered for this course was 10 LPA. Many top companies visited for recruitment. Percentage of students got internships in this college was more than 90%.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities were available in this course. The food quality in my college was so good.
content.Faculty: Teachers in my college were so helpful and qualified. All were so knowledgeable, and they had great teaching quality. This course was not curriculum relevant, and students were industry-ready. Semester exams in this course were so easy. The pass percentage was 60%.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at VGI, Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can easily get direct admission at Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI), Greater Noida. Admissions at VGI are done on the basis of the candidate's academic merit from their most recent qualifying examination (10/12/graduation). Along with this, the institute also accepts scores from entrance examinations like CUET, UPCET, CAT, MAT, XAT, etc.

faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility requirement at VGI, Greater Noida for B.Sc?
faqs.answer: The minimum eligibility requirement for the B.Sc. program at Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI), Greater Noida, is completion of 12th with at least 33% marks. The total tuition fee for the B.Sc. program at VGI, Greater Noida, can range from INR 45K to INR 1.2 Lakh. There are a total of 360 seats available for this program.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for MBA at VGI, Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: The total intake forMBAis60seats.VGI Greater Noida offers two MBA programsMBA (Regular): A traditional MBA program.MBA Employability: Focused on enhancing employability skillsEligibility: Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent (10 + 2 + 3) in any discipline with minimum of 50% aggregate marks from a recognised Indian or foreign university.(45% for reserved category)Entrance Exam: MAT / XAT / CAT / UPSEECut off: 50 Percentile in Entrance Exams.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by VGI, Greater Noida for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: The Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI) in Greater Noida accepts scores from the following entrance exams for admission to its Master of Business Administration (MBA) program: CAT, XAT, MAT, CUET. To get admission in MBA at VGI, Greater Noida, you must appear for the CUET PG Exam, which is conducted every year by NTA.

hostel_campus.college_name: Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI) Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: About Visvesvaraya Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are Wi-Fi, full speed, and 24/7 availability. Labs are very big and well-cleaned and ventilated. Classrooms are also good and clean. A well-stocked library is present with all resources. The quality of facilities in my hostel is acceptable. The quality of food is good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities and sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: The name of my college is Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: I liked this college, I am doing B.A. here, and I liked the infrastructure here very much. The studies here are also very good, with a lot of internships. I am doing BBA from here, and it has taken me one year to do this course. It is very good to come here, and 60 percent is required for interns.

reviews.review_heading: It has decent academic support with a good campus. It needs more practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study materials. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average. The canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage students' recreation. Overall, the infrastructure is...

reviews.review_heading: The best college, if you are financially not that well.
reviews.review_text: We have good infrastructure, Wi-Fi availability, classrooms are good, and proper hygiene is maintained. We have two libraries where more than 10 personal computers are there to learn and search things. High-speed internet is there all around the campus which is easily accessible.

reviews.review_heading: Review in the Shiksha by Rishabh Kaushik.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities were available in this course. The food quality in my college was so good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the upcoming best college in Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are all facilities for students they need like good labs and the library to study. The hostel facilities are also good. The hostel mess is very good and clean. The food is also good in taste.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: This course is awesome, according to me, because in this course, the college is offering great certifications which are very useful in any company to join. Certifications like Digital Marketing, Business Analyst, etc. And also, they provide proper training to the students who don't know how to prepare for interviews.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a short campus and average placements, but I am satisfied with our college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working on some floors. Labs are outdated. The infrastructure at VGI is not good. Our classrooms are not very good. Faculty members' rooms are in poor condition. The library is very old. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are not great.

reviews.review_heading: VISHVESHWARYA GROUP OF INSTITUTIONS
reviews.review_text: The available facilities of my college are WiFi, library, classroom, computer labs, sports ground, and for mobile games, there is a gaming room, etc. The food and medical facilities are the best facilities of my college; there are sports tournaments in which cricket is the most entertaining part of our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI).
reviews.review_text:
Wifi, lab, canteen, proper library with all books available and smart classrooms are there in all classes. Regular practicals are provided and there is a very large class room. In the hostel, 2 fans, 3 almirahs, a big balcony, a bed, a window, wifi, and 2, 3, 4 and 1 all-seater are available.
Sports are regularly conducted in the evening.
Cricket , football, volleyball, table tennis, and many other games are available in the gym also.
4 times food is available, with different food every day.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college for B. Teach.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a totally Wi-Fi campus with decent speed. Labs are highly sophisticated with well-maintained equipment and machines. Our college also has a research lab. Our college has its own mess, which provides 3 meals a day and also snacks in the evening. The quality of food is decent and hygiene is maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The real experience of the campus .
reviews.review_text:
Wi-fi, 3-4 computer labs, 3 libraries, and 3 seminar halls are present on our campus.
Overall, the infrastructure is good, but there is room for improvement.
Hostel facilities for both boys and girls are provided separately. 
There is mess, gym, basketball court, and a common area for small celebrations like birthdays.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. They have good classrooms, Wi-Fi facilities, and the cafeteria even provides a good library with plenty of books. They have a digital library, and the labs are often updated with modern systems and software. The hostel provides good food and maintains hygiene. Even the canteen is good; they provide hygienic food. Sports and games are offered to encourage us in extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Reasons why I chose this university.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is accredited and Wi-Fi-enabled. The library has plenty of space and a large selection of books in various journals to study. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good but could be better. The hostels are okay, not too good .

reviews.review_heading: High experienced faculty .
reviews.review_text: We have extraordinary labs with highly updated tools and equipment. The daily lab practicals are done. The infrastructure available in the college is excellent, with huge ground to play. Some events are happening like farewells, freshers, events, etc.

college_info.college_name: Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions (VGI) Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Following are the fee structure for various courses offered by VGI, Greater Noida:-
Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions is one of the top institutes in Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh.
The Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions has recently conducted a placements drive for the 2024 passing out batch students and provides handsome salary packages.
Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions is also accepting applications from International Candidates for UG, PG, Diploma, and Certificate courses.
VGI, Greater Noida offered 100% Scholarships to eligible candidates based on their academic excellence and extracurricular achievements.
Record-breaking placements by Vishveshwarya Group of Institutions average salary package offered INR 6.2 LPA during the placement drive.
VGI, Greater Noida has world-class infrastructure facilities for students and staff.

Pursuing a B.Pharma at VGI, Great Noida costs around INR 1-1.2 Lacs annually. The four-year curriculum costs approximately upto INR 4 to 4.8 Lacs. This fee structure includes tuition, lab fees, and other like academic expenses. Additional usage costs may include hostel rooms, examination fees and study materials which could increase the total cost for this. VGI also provides the scholarships and financial aid based on the merit and their need, which helps the eligible students alleviate their financial burdens.

The placements of B.Sc. graduates can vary and are dependent on several factors, such as the institute's reputation, the student's academic performance, and the job market demand for professionals in the related fields. The average salary for B.Sc. in Agriculture at VGI, Greater Noida, is around INR 2.62 LPA, with the lowest package being INR 2.40 LPA. However, all B.Sc. graduates can expect an average salary ranging from INR 2.5 to INR 4.5 LPA.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: ILAHIA College of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. ILAHIA College of Engineering and Technology fee structure ranges between INR 1,00,000 to 9,04,550.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the ILAHIA College of Engineering and Technology is around INR 135000 - INR 904550.

faqs.answer: A:    ILAHIA College of Engineering and Technology is a good institution for MCA, M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at ILAHIA College of Engineering and Technology are Industrial Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Power Engineering, Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Structural Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Robotics Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A good college where you can study and enjoy your college life.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50% students are placed during the campus placement. Some of the top recruiting companies are UST Global, Infosys, EY, etc. The average package given by most of the arriving companies is around 3-4 LPA. At least 20% students got internships at various companies through their project performance.
review_content.Infrastructure: ICET is equipped with high-end infrastructure, which is essential for the all-around development of students. ICET is providing extremely modern facilities that offer numerous services for the students. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, etc. All facilities are available. They are good. Hostel facilities are also good. Food in the mess and canteen has good quality. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are also active in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, but feels a bit like a prison.

review_content.Placements: Many top core companies like Ashok Leyland, SFO Technologies, Tata, and Mahindra come to our college for campus interviews. The average salary package offered is around 5 LPA, with the highest package being 15 LPA and the lowest 3 LPA. Getting an internship is not hard since the staff have a lot of connections. review_summary.college_name: ILAHIA College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech . in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and placement.

content.Placements: The college offers many placement opportunities at various companies along with placement training, which helps you and builds you into an industry-ready engineer at the end of the course. I really appreciate the effort of the management and the faculty in the placement sector.
content.Infrastructure: The college has an above-average infrastructure. And also for my department, I will say it is good. Many computer labs, workshops, and other labs are all there for each department. Also, the college is located on a hill, which makes the campus look really good with a mountain view. Also, the cafeteria and the canteen are really good, offering many varieties and a huge space.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college with a supportive environment and decent opportunities.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are decent, with about half the students getting placed during campus recruitment. Companies like Infosys, EY, and Sutherland regularly recruit here. The average salary package is around INR 3-4 LPA. Some students also land internships through project work.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a maintained campus with good infrastructure. Classrooms, labs, and the library are up to date. Hostel facilities are satisfactory, and the food served in the mess and canteen is hygienic and fairly good. Students are encouraged to take part in sports and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A good college where you can study and enjoy your college life.

content.Placements: Almost 50% students are placed during the campus placement. Some of the top recruiting companies are UST Global, Infosys, EY, etc. The average package given by most of the arriving companies is around 3-4 LPA. At least 20% students got internships at various companies through their project performance.
content.Infrastructure: ICET is equipped with high-end infrastructure, which is essential for the all-around development of students. ICET is providing extremely modern facilities that offer numerous services for the students. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, etc. All facilities are available. They are good. Hostel facilities are also good. Food in the mess and canteen has good quality. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are also active in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college, but feels a bit like a prison.

content.Placements: Many top core companies like Ashok Leyland, SFO Technologies, Tata, and Mahindra come to our college for campus interviews. The average salary package offered is around 5 LPA, with the highest package being 15 LPA and the lowest 3 LPA. Getting an internship is not hard since the staff have a lot of connections. The highest role offered in this course is Chief Engineer in the Electricity Board.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is average, with some departments excelling. Every department has its own library, and there’s also a central library, which is a huge help for references and source materials. The hostel facilities are above average, and there is also a gymnasium for students and staff.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent facilities. Good atmosphere and ambience.

content.Placements: Most students will get placement. General packages are between 20000 and 30000. The recruiting companies are mainly South Indian-based, like Infosys. Generally, almost all students who get a CGPA of 6 and above get placement by campus interview.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, libraries, etc.—all facilities are available and good in this campus. Good atmosphere and better ambience are there. Hostel facilities are also good. Food in mess and canteen have good quality. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are also active in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and looks impressive from the outside.
reviews.review_text: The department is very good to see and has NBA certification. The labs are well-equipped, and they provide high-speed Wi-Fi to activate our systems. The quality of hostel food is very good. They have an MS committee that allows us to choose our food every month, and they always provide good meals. There is also a new gym facility. The sports and medical teams are always active.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely happy to choose my college.
reviews.review_text: All courses have different buildings as departments, and the campus is beautiful and has a very natural feel in all senses. For all courses, lab facilities are available, along with all infrastructure. The hostel has good infrastructure with good food and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: All the teachers are very helpful and qualified
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, all required labs, libraries, etc., are available in our college. The hostel is good and contains good food. Hostel rooms and facilities in the hostel are good. reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities provided at our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We have air-conditioned classrooms, a group discussion room, a separate library for MBA students, a computer lab, etc. We are satisfied with the hostel facility provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ILAHIA College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are satisfying. The hostel has quality rooms with an above-average mess at an affordable price. It needs renovation works for the classrooms and more than that the lab should be equipped with the latest machinery's. Wi-Fi is provided to appropriate branch students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an above-average engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good, neatly maintained, and spacious. Our college has a departmental library, labs, Wi-Fi in the civil department. Wi-Fi connections are MAC ID reserved, and it is available only for laptops. Students have to register their MAC ID to college. The canteen is good, budget-friendly and serves tasty food. There are two canteens on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college and hostel facilities are good. The library has a wide variety of academic book collection. Quality of hostel and canteen food is extremely good and at a reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. It is located in a hilly area, and the atmosphere is very peaceful. Labs are of the newest technology, and Wi-Fi is available all around the campus. The hostel is not up to expectations but is good. Food served is below average but rest assured is best.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ILAHIA College of Engineering and Technology (ICET Kerala).
reviews.review_text: All the self-financing colleges focus on the infrastructure of college and hostels. The college provides labs for mechanical, electrical, electronics, computer science and civil departments. Sports like basketball, football and cricket are played on the campus. Classrooms are good enough. The most difficult interaction zone was college stores, as they were always crowded. There is no proper management.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty impressive. All the necessary labs, a good library, a canteen and a gym are available. There are also a basketball court, football field and a badminton court. There are computer labs as well. Other labs are available for mechanical, civil, electrical, electronics and communication branches.

review_summary.college_name: Institute of Technology, University of Kashmir, Zakura Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best place to seek and develop website.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students got placed in our college every year. The top recruiting companies are Mahindra, Tata, and other companies. Top roles offered in our course are junior engineer and others. Around 80% of students got internships from our course every year.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are the best in our university. We have the best canteen, Wi-Fi, medical facilities and sports council. In hostel, we have the most synthetic food and hygienic food. Canteen is clean.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and qualified. Some of them are Ph.D. and M.Tech holders. The teaching quality is awesome. Course curriculum is very relevant and it makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are quite difficult for students but by the help of teachers we can easily clear the semester.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Well, the college is average, but there is scope for a lot of improvements.

content.Placements: I worry about placements because this year only 4 people were selected. Out of them, 2 were from rural areas and 2 were from urban areas. I fear for the future of my career. The placement is really messed up, even the seniors had the same views on it, so you would have to keep this in mind and not rely on the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is alright, for better or worse, but it can have a bit of improvement. The overall view is really nice though. But you would here and there face problems with hygiene and all in bathrooms, etc. The classes are good, the teachers care about your studies a lot and are helpful. But the labs don’t have good quality stuff, and the Chemistry lab doesn’t have all the required things. Also, the teachers can ruin your career anytime, so you would have to be good with them and be really cautious about it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, placements are good, but the checking in exams is brutal.

content.Placements: About 60% of the students were placed. The highest package was about 14.5 CTC and the lowest was 5.5 CTC, which were offered by Tata, Vedanta, Indus Towers, etc. About 80-90% of the students got internships in Mahindra, Jamkash, Boiler Plants, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The labs, library, and Wi-Fi facilities are good, but the boards in the classrooms are not up to the standards. The medical facilities and mess are fine, but the canteen is not available in the premises. The sports and games are also not up to the standards as compared to other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for B.Tech in Kashmir.

content.Placements: Best college, many students are getting placed every year. Approximately 10 students from every batch get placed, and companies like Tata and Mango, along with other big companies, recruit students from our university. The highest package is 22 lac per annum, and the average is 12 lac per annum.
content.Infrastructure: There are big classrooms, and the quality of benches or tables is great. We have a big library, and we have every book there. The hostel is very big, and the food quality in the mess is outstanding. The medical facility is average, and the sports and games are outstanding as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good to go to college. Infrastructure is satisfactory.

content.Placements: Sixty-five percent of students get placed. The highest package offered till date was fourteen lakhs per annum. Almost all students who take B.Tech seriously get internships, and all the roles offered while placements are mostly software engineers and developers.
content.Infrastructure: Food was good, hygienic, and very delicious. The menu contains both veg and non-veg. One can pick the food according to his/her requirements. The college also organises various types of tournaments for students, like cricket tournaments and football tournaments. The college doesn't have Wi-Fi.

Meal quality and menu rate according to me are 8.5 out of 10. College provides a link in Gmail id for all students, those who want to live in a hostel can fill out this form. And hostel will provide accordingly.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are the best compared to other universities. The infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available in our college all day, but in the hostel, it is available only for 6 to 9 hours. The library is huge and good, and we can go there comfortably.

Here in the hostel in Kashmir University you get every important thing you need

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty members and good placements of our college.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The important subjects might vary slightly depending on the university as every university follow a certain set of guidelines when it comes to their coursework, but common topics covered in the course usually remain almost the same that include]Advanced Algorithms and Data Structures]Software Engineering Principles]AI and MLComputer Networks and Distributed SystemsDatabase Management SystemsComputer Architecture and OrganizationYou also get to choose from a variety of elective subjects in the second year as per your interests and career goals.Know more about -MTech Courses
faqs.question: Q: What are the core subjects covered in M.Tech CSE program?

faqs.answer: The clear answer is no. The syllabus for MTech in Computer Science Engineering varies from one college to another. Every college abides by a certain coursework guideline decided by the college committee at the beginning of the academic year. Generally speaking, the syllabus includes some core subjects, elective subject choices, laboratory classes, and project work.Though the subjects might vary, the basic concepts taught in the classes are almost similar, covering all the fundamental knowledge and advanced-level CSE concepts that give you a comprehensive understanding of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the M.Tech CSE syllabus same for all Indian colleges?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is best for a bachelor's degree in B.Sc. Agri. Hons. The infrastructure and facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: There are 200 students studying on our main campus located at Palanpur Dantiwada, and including sub-branches, we have around 260 seats. There are very few to moderate placements because there is not any big industry present in the locality. In the year 2020, 10 students were placed through campus recruitment with the highest salary package of 13 LPA. The average package is between 2 LPA and 2.5 LPA. The placements are not very impressive because half of the batch apply for PG study. Some students start their own businesses or become entrepreneurs. Top recruiting companies are Agro Star, IDBI Bank, Kisan Sanchar, IFFCO, and some other NGO's. At our college, only about 2% to 3% of students get the opportunity to do an internship. They offer a role as a junior executive bank manager.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with great teachers, good hostels, sports grounds, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 30-35% of students are placed in this course. The average salary pacakge offered is Rs 30,000. They offered roles as company department managers at fertilizer factories, in research fields, etc. Different private companies are there as well as some government companies also.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, there are 3 libraries, separate laboratories for different subjects with all the needed equipment. Wi-Fi facilities are available, air-conditioned classrooms with a capacity of 80 students per class. They a lot 3 students or room with combine washroom between two rooms, food is good and healthy as well as heavy. PHC is there for any type of emergency, and other medical facilities. There are volleyball, basketball, cricket table tennis, badminton, athletics, gym, swimming pool are also available.

review_summary.college_name: Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of SDAU Dantiwada.

content.Placements: In our college, only a few students get jobs in companies, so there are fewer chances of getting placements. Some professors are very nice and help students find jobs. My friend got a job at HDFC Bank with the help of our professor. Top roles available are professor and assistant professor.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are very high-tech, equipped with projectors and TVs for studying. The classes have air conditioning, making it comfortable for both teachers and students. The college organizes sports events like inter-college competitions and cultural contests, with all students participating in many events.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I like our college and am happy for getting admission to this college.

content.Placements: All students need at least 60% in the Gujarat board and 40 marks in GUJCET for admission to our college. In this course, all students need to complete 4 years. There is 3 year of study and one year of internship. The college will give Rs.18000 per month in the internship as a stipend.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel of our college has the best infrastructure of all agriculture colleges. There is a different hostel for boys and girls. There is one mess in our college. They take Rs.2600 per month for food. They give us breakfast in the morning then lunch and dinner.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is best for a bachelor's degree in B.Sc. Agri. Hons. The infrastructure and facilities are good.

content.Placements: There are 200 students studying on our main campus located at Palanpur Dantiwada, and including sub-branches, we have around 260 seats. There are very few to moderate placements because there is not any big industry present in the locality. In the year 2020, 10 students were placed through campus recruitment with the highest salary package of 13 LPA. The average package is between 2 LPA and 2.5 LPA. The placements are not very impressive because half of the batch apply for PG study. Some students start their own businesses or become entrepreneurs. Top recruiting companies are Agro Star, IDBI Bank, Kisan Sanchar, IFFCO, and some other NGO's. At our college, only about 2% to 3% of students get the opportunity to do an internship. They offer a role as a junior executive bank manager.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with great teachers, good hostels, sports grounds, and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 30-35% of students are placed in this course. The average salary pacakge offered is Rs 30,000. They offered roles as company department managers at fertilizer factories, in research fields, etc. Different private companies are there as well as some government companies also.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, there are 3 libraries, separate laboratories for different subjects with all the needed equipment. Wi-Fi facilities are available, air-conditioned classrooms with a capacity of 80 students per class. They a lot 3 students or room with combine washroom between two rooms, food is good and healthy as well as heavy. PHC is there for any type of emergency, and other medical facilities. There are volleyball, basketball, cricket table tennis, badminton, athletics, gym, swimming pool are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy and Food Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements.

content.Placements: About 30% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Banas Dairy and HyFun Foods visit our campus for placements. Almost 100% of students from our course got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure. It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, smart classrooms and a library with computers. Library and computer are helpful to us to get new innovative ideas. The mess serves healthy and delicious food. Our college provides good sports equipment.

review_content.Placements: Site Engineer supervises construction at site, manages resources, and ensures safety for 3-5 LPA. Junior Civil Engineer assists in project planning, drawing interpretation, and cost estimates for 3-4 LPA. Design Engineer works with AutoCAD, STAAD Pro, and ETABS to design structural components for 4-6 LPA. Structural Engineer analyzes loads and designs frameworks for buildings, bridges, etc., for 5-8 LPA. Planning Engineer schedules and monitors progress using tools like MS Project and Primavera for 4-6 LPA. Quality Control/Quality Assurance Engineer monitors material and construction quality and conducts lab tests for 3-5 LPA. Estimation & Billing Engineer prepares cost estimates, billing reports, and BOQs for 3.5-5.5 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Textile Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: In my college, the Textile Engineering department has 100% placement every year.

content.Placements: There is 100% placement for my batchmates. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.6 LPA. Top recruiters are Reliance and Trident. 90% of students got internships in Trident, Arti, and Sporting. They teach us to use theory in practical work in labs. It was a great experience for me.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and the library are very good. The hostel infrastructure is overall good, and the food is also healthy and hygienic. A warden is provided by the college for every hostel, and dispensary facilities are also available in the hostel. Near the hostel, a playing ground is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An honest review of 4 years.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed always depends on students' capabilities and also on the college and faculty. There were 40%-50% students who were placed in the previous batch. The highest package is 6 LPA-7 LPA and the average is 2.5 LPA-3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are 10 years old, like Byjus but now new startups and companies like Trident and Accenture give the opportunity. In my course, 5 students from my batch got internships at Trident. Top roles offered are software engineer, frontend developer, backend developer, and other major roles.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Students will get a good college experience overall if they stay focused.

content.Placements: Placements for the CSE branch are around 50%, and many students get placed depending on their skills. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is around 1 LPA. content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, especially the CSE department building. Wi-Fi is available in labs and works well. Classrooms are clean and equipped. The library is well-maintained, and it is my favorite place in college. Overall, facilities are decent and useful for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Moderate placements, but strong academics and campus life in the Civil branch.

content.Placements: Site Engineer supervises construction at site, manages resources, and ensures safety for 3-5 LPA. Junior Civil Engineer assists in project planning, drawing interpretation, and cost estimates for 3-4 LPA. Design Engineer works with AutoCAD, STAAD Pro, and ETABS to design structural components for 4-6 LPA. Structural Engineer analyzes loads and designs frameworks for buildings, bridges, etc., for 5-8 LPA. Planning Engineer schedules and monitors progress using tools like MS Project and Primavera for 4-6 LPA. Quality Control/Quality Assurance Engineer monitors material and construction quality and conducts lab tests for 3-5 LPA. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is supportive, and the campus life is decent

content.Placements: Eligible students got placed in the 2023-2024 batch, with around 45% of students from my course securing placements; the highest package is about ₹10 LPA, and the average is around ₹4–5 LPA, with companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and some product-based firms like Amazon recruiting, while internships were limited but a few students got opportunities at Microsoft and Trident, and most of us secured roles such as software developer, data analyst, and system engineer, overall, if you work hard, there are good chances to get placed here.
content.Infrastructure: At Giani Zail Singh College, our department has good classrooms, Wi-Fi, labs, and a library with useful books. The campus is clean and offers all basic facilities. Hostel rooms are adequate, but cleanliness could be improved. Mess food is average, while the canteen offers more variety and is cleaner. There is a small medical center on campus for basic care. Sports facilities like a cricket ground, basketball court, and indoor games are available and well-maintained.

hostel_campus.college_name: Giani Zail Singh College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Giani Zail Singh College of Engineering and Technology has five boys hostel and two girls hostel. Each hostel has its own mess, common room, vehicle parking space. 24 hours water and power supply to the hostels.

library.description: Giani Zail Singh College of Engineering and Technology has a well-equipped library with a rich collection of 63600 volumes of reference and textbook, e-journals (IEEE, ASME, ASCE, and Science Direct, SAGE, and Pro-quest) and 650 e-books facilities. E-Library has 23 PCs. It has an active membership of DELNET. The library has a spacious reading hall with a seating capacity of 150 students. Book bank facility is also available for SC/ST students.

reviews.review_heading: In my college, the Textile Engineering department has 100% placement every year.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and the library are very good. The hostel infrastructure is overall good, and the food is also healthy and hygienic. A warden is provided by the college for every hostel, and dispensary facilities are also available in the hostel. Near the hostel, a playing ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of 4 years.
reviews.review_text: There are labs with a normal specs computer where you can run software installed by the institute only. Labs are fully AC-enabled. If you are willing to take engineering courses, then your classes will be college-side, where classrooms are good but not the best. The hostel in which you are shifted in your first year has a good infrastructure, in which the lift is working till you pay the fees. After that, when classes start, the lift will be out of order or only for staff. But after the first ye...

reviews.review_heading: Students will get a good college experience overall if they stay focused.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, especially the CSE department building. Wi-Fi is available in labs and works well. Classrooms are clean and equipped. The library is well-maintained, and it is my favorite place in college. Overall, facilities are decent and useful for students.

reviews.review_heading: Moderate placements, but strong academics and campus life in the Civil branch.
reviews.review_text: Facilities include smart classrooms, labs, a library, gym, auditoriums, a cafeteria, and sports grounds for cricket, football, basketball, and volleyball. Hostels are a mix: there are new hostels with lifts and single rooms available from the 3rd year, but some older blocks still need maintenance. Wi-Fi has mixed reviews; some say campus Wi-Fi works, while others report zero connectivity. Overall, it's a green, clean campus with good campus life, including annual fests like Tarannum and Youth Fe...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is supportive, and the campus life is decent
reviews.review_text: At Giani Zail Singh College, our department has good classrooms, Wi-Fi, labs, and a library with useful books. The campus is clean and offers all basic facilities. Hostel rooms are adequate, but cleanliness could be improved. Mess food is average, while the canteen offers more variety and is cleaner. There is a small medical center on campus for basic care. Sports facilities like a cricket ground, basketball court, and indoor games are available and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with good faculty, facilities, and a green campus.
reviews.review_text: The mess food is also good in terms of compared to other colleges. But the most important thing is that the new hostels are really good facilitated, with lifts. Even labs and classrooms are also well-facilitated with the latest equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Giani Zail Singh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is very old from the 1950s, and in the name of college, there are only trees and greenery everywhere and less area for classrooms.
Wi-Fi is zero here, although they say they have Wi-Fi on boards. The quality of food in the mess is okay, but there are no sports competitions here.

reviews.review_heading: Great hostel life. Great infrastructure. Changes are needed in placements and management.
reviews.review_text: The college and university infrastructure is nice, with architecture enriched by Sikhism. The apparatus, machines, and tools in labs are quite old, but they still work. Hostels are also quite good. Students will get their money's worth in the hostel. Although hostels are old, they will receive facilities you deserve. The hostel environment is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, good faculty, good campus, bad placements and bad crowd.
reviews.review_text: The college and university buildings are nice, with good architecture. Machines and equipment work fine, but they're old. Hostels need repair, but they are nice altogether. You will not face any problems in the hostel. It’s a government college, so please don’t keep too many expectations for infrastructure facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of good teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus, in labs, classrooms and also in the library. The hostel also provides Wi-Fi 24 hours a day. Best quality and quantity of food. There is a ragging-free environment. A medical facility is available, as is a dispensary that is open during the day, and a doctor is also available. AIIMS Bathinda is also nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all the facilities. The hostel facilities are not very good. The food served in the mess is not good. Our college is old. Labs are equipped with air-conditioners. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. A gymnasium is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Giani Zail Singh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, etc. The Wi-Fi facility is not good. The lab has limited equipment. The library is equipped with air-conditioners. It has limited books. The food served in the mess is average. You have to find PG.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculties.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so good and facilities too are not so good. Wi-Fi is not provided. Labs are good. Classrooms are too bad. Library is good, but you can issue only three books at a time.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University.
reviews.review_text: Students had clubs for technical and non-technical events along with a reading room. It provides a library, grounds, and a gym facility was also available. There were five hostels for boys and 2 for girls. The campus was clean and full of greenery along with tracks for practice.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with the college, and overall, it is a good college for education.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is lush green with amazing infrastructure and new buildings made with traditional architecture, and many new buildings are to be made in the future. The authority is thinking of expansion of the campus with new hostels for boys and girls.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent college with decent faculty and placement.

content.Placements: Getting hired in this college completely depends on the student; the more effort you put in, the better your chances of getting into a good company. Being dependent on college for spoon-feeding is not an option here; give your best, and teachers will also back you.
content.Infrastructure: Decent college with developing buildings. Wi-Fi-enabled labs, but you obviously can't expect great things. Decent hostels and not 5-star food facilities; classrooms are fine and tidy, and the library is decently full. There are flaws, like the campus is not that huge.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good learning experience but needs better placements and facilities.

content.Placements: Approximately 55-60 percent of our students were placed. The average package is between 3.5 and 4 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the highest is approximately 7 LPA. Companies like High Source, V4U Global, and Infosys came to the campus. A few students were able to secure internships at mid-size and startup IT companies. The most roles were in support, testing, and software development.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are simple and updated. Although Wi-Fi is available, it is not always dependable. There are a good number of books in the library. The hostel rooms could use some improvement in terms of upkeep. The mess's food is not good sometimes. There aren't many well-maintained sports facilities.

description: Bangalore Technological Institute cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BE/BTech programmes via the COMEDK UGCET examination. Students can view the exam-wise sections below to know the cutoffs for various accepted examinations across different rounds, categories and quotas. Refer to the pointers below for more exam-related updates:

Bangalore Technological Institute KCET cutoff 2025 has been closed for intake to B.E. / B.Tech and other courses. The cutoff was published for reserved and unreserved category students belonging to AI and HS quotas. For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the last round closing ranks were between 138754 and 260817.5 in the General category for the AI quota. Considering the ranks, the most challenging specialisation for admission was B.E. in Civil Engineering with the lowest cutoff rank of 138754.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Civil Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 138754 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 267456, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

Bangalore Technological Institute KCET cutoff has been released for various categories such as General, OBC, SC, and ST, among others. Check out the consolidated PDFs for the year-wise and round-wise cutoff lists in the table given below:

Here, candidates can compare other colleges accepting the KCET entrance exam with different specialisation options for admission. The cutoff comparison provided below is for the General AI category students. To compare the colleges based on location, gender, etc., use the provided filter:

According to the Bangalore Technological Institute B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 53793 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 86987. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.
