reviews.review_heading: Decent college with decent faculty and placement.
reviews.review_text: Decent college with developing buildings. Wi-Fi-enabled labs, but you obviously can't expect great things. Decent hostels and not 5-star food facilities; classrooms are fine and tidy, and the library is decently full. There are flaws, like the campus is not that huge.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning experience but needs better placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are simple and updated. Although Wi-Fi is available, it is not always dependable. There are a good number of books in the library. The hostel rooms could use some improvement in terms of upkeep. The mess's food is not good sometimes. There aren't many well-maintained sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college if you are looking for less fees and are not looking for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good in this college. There are three labs allocated for the Computer Science department, including all three years. A library is available, and students can reach out till 5 PM. Classrooms have sufficient space but are not maintained properly.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has poor infrastructure, but the teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: The college is still under construction. There are no upgrades in restrooms, classrooms, or the library. Wi-Fi is not available for the students. Labs are average. Our college does not provide good infrastructure. The quality of food is not very good in our hostel, and the facilities in the rooms and the library are not sufficient.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, but the auditorium and canteen facilities should be improved.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. Wi-Fi speed is slow. The college is spread over 15 acres of land, which is maintained decently with trees. The atmosphere is good. The canteen in the college is not so good. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has poor infrastructure, but teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: The college is still under construction. There are no upgrades in restrooms, classrooms, or the library. Classroom roofs leak a lot during the rainy season. Wi-Fi is not available. Labs are average. Our college does not provide good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, and everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available. Air-conditioners were available in classrooms. The library was well maintained. There was a theatre, gym, sports ground, and a huge convent hall for students. The hostel was good. Washrooms were well-maintained. The living room was good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel food and bedrooms are very good and comfortable. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. They are near the college. Hostels are good. They provide 24X7 water and electricity facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bangalore Technological Institute.
reviews.review_text: They had Wi-Fi, but students didn't have access to it. Wi-Fi was used only for the systems we use in labs. The systems in the labs were not too good and upgraded. They must provide better equipment for a mechanical laboratory. Classrooms were clean and tidy which made students feel comfortable. The library was good but small. The collection of books was not so appreciable. Hostel food was not worth our money and some rules were unnecessary and questionable. The medical facility was not available...

reviews.review_heading: Manageable campus, with good education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. The campus is getting developed and the sports and other facilities are getting in consideration. The hostel provides various room-sharing options. The canteen is also quite average. Mess food is just manageable.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The food served in the hostel is good. The infrastructure is not good in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is huge enough and has attached bathrooms with a 24 hours hot water supply. The food served is also very healthy, and the cooks are very hygienic. You will feel like you are having your food with your family members. There is a huge playground where you can play sports like cricket, football, volleyball and other sports as per your choice.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its cooperative faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college is really doing a great job for the betterment of infrastructure. In the current scenario, the quality of facilities provided in our hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is absolutely hygienic. For sports, our college does really a great job.

reviews.review_heading: The college management provides good faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is impressive. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It has all basic necessities which include academic block, hostel, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games. The college is spread over 17 acres which is sufficient for all kinds of need. This college is situated in a rural area to avoid traffic disturbance. Transportation facilities are available here.

reviews.review_heading: BTI is good at infrastructure, teaching facilities, and average at campus life and placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at BTI is average I would say as of now. The college is in a stage of development, and the developments are happening progressively. The college is occupied with a full Wi-Fi campus, and the campus is well-monitored. The library has some advanced lab facilities.

faqs.answer:
A:    Manikya Lal Verma Textile and Engineering College (MLVTEC) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 12th with Physics and/or Mathematics / Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship (Any of the three).
Candidate must have obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ ST/ Non creamy layer OBC/ Non creamy layer MBC and PwD category of Rajasthan State) in the above subjects taken together in the final examination of Board of Secondary Education, Rajasthan (RBSE) or Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) or any other examination recognised and equivalent to Board of Secondary Education, Rajasthan/Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE).
OR
Candidate must have passed minimum 3 years Diploma examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category SC/ ST/ Non creamy layer OBC/Non creamy layer MBC and PwD category of Rajasthan State).M.E./M.TechCandidates with qualifications obtained through examinations conducted by professional societies recognised by MHRD/UGC/AIU/UPSC/AICTE {e.g. AMIE by Institute of Engineers (India); AMICE by Institute of Civil Engineers (India); IEE} as equivalent to B.E./B.Tech. are also eligible.

Manikya Lal Verma Textile and Engineering College (MLVTEC) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Textile Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Textile Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at Manikya Lal Verma Textile and Engineering College (MLVTEC)?

faqs.answer: Manikya Lal Verma Textile and Engineering College (MLVTEC) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 12th with Physics and/or Mathematics / Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship (Any of the three). Candidate must have obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ ST/ Non creamy layer OBC/ Non creamy layer MBC and PwD category of Rajasthan State) in the above subjects taken together in the final examination of Board of Secondary Education, Rajasthan (RBSE) or Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) or any other examination recognised and equivalent to Board of Secondary Education, Rajasthan/Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE). OR Candidate must have passed minimum 3 years Diploma examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category SC/ ST/ Non creamy layer OBC/Non creamy layer MBC and PwD category of Rajasthan State).M.E./M.TechCandidates with qualifications obtained through examinations conducted by professional societies recognised by MHRD/UGC/AIU/UPSC/AICTE {e.g. AMIE by Institute of Engineers (India); AMICE by Institute of Civil Engineers (India); IEE} as equivalent to B.E./B.Tech. are also eligible.

individual_reviews.title: A little highlight on the ECE department of MLVTEC.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is around 60%. The highest package is 18 LPA off-campus, and on-campus it is 8 LPA, while the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Redchilies, and TCS. Internships are provided to nearly 100% of students, but since the companies are local, students find them on their own. The top role is chief engineer.
content.Infrastructure: For my department, the Wi-Fi is not very good, at times, it operates at 3G speed, which is quite slow. However, there is 5G Wi-Fi in the library. Almost every book you need is available, though in limited quantity, including books for GATE preparation. The classrooms are in okay condition. The labs are not very good because half of the instruments are not working. The hostels are good, with spacious rooms and a big garden for us. They also have unlimited Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: A little highlight on the ECE department of MLVTEC.
reviews.review_text: For my department, the Wi-Fi is not very good, at times, it operates at 3G speed, which is quite slow. However, there is 5G Wi-Fi in the library. Almost every book you need is available, though in limited quantity, including books for GATE preparation. The classrooms are in okay condition. The labs are not very good because half of the instruments are not working. The hostels are good, with spacious rooms and a big garden for us. They also have unlimited Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Manikya Lal Verma Textile and Engineering College (MLVTEC).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our classrooms and college is very good. Every classroom has AC and Wi-Fi is provided everywhere. The net speed is not good. The library hall is wholly quiet. Hostel infrastructure is average but all facilities are provided for students. Food provided in the mess and canteen is under the provision of the medical team.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with it. The college is not worth paying 3.5 lakhs.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very old but the hostel infrastructure is quite maintained as compared to other colleges. However, both are not quite impressive. Sports grounds for hockey and basketball are pretty much good. The canteen facility is not available. Mess is available near the college.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best and only one college for textile engineering in Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi, but it is only available in specific areas. The labs for CS are well-equipped, but ECE labs are not as good, with some devices not functioning properly. However, textile labs are well-maintained and provide excellent exposure to industrial setups and practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: 100% Placement in Textile Course in My College.
reviews.review_text: According to me, this college lacks proper infrastructure for both the campus and hostels. Hostels are not well maintained and are in the worst condition. The college has Wi-Fi. Classrooms are also not so good. The library is in good condition; I don't know how. The mess in the hostel is nice. Sports and games are also good here; all types of games are played here, like basketball, table tennis, badminton, kho, handball – you name it, they have it.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are next to nil, the faculty is knowledgeable, the campus is more textile-centered.
reviews.review_text: Food is good as it has a student mess. The facilities are not so good, the library is average. There's no canteen in the college. There are many sports options but not good conditions for them as well. The PCs are not powerful enough, you will need your laptop at any cost.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good for placement, crowd, teaching new skills, and events.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the facilities are good for teaching the course, and the department is also good for understanding the course in detailed analysis. The college also provides high-frequency Wi-Fi to help. In the hostel, the infrastructure is not good, and Wi-Fi is not provided. The mess is really good in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good. But grading is low.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the facilities are good for teaching the course, and the department is also good to understand about the course in detail analysis; the college also provides a high-frequency Wi-Fi to help. In the hostel, the infrastructure is not good, and Wi-Fi is not provided, but the mess is really good in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is not so bad; it is just a below-average college.
reviews.review_text: The library is huge and neat and clean. The atmosphere is good and Wi-Fi is also available. Classes are not that much clean and the computers of the lab are also very old software. Hostel rooms are okay and food is average. The grounds of the hostel are good and well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is preferable to take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are in good condition at our college. There is a lot of cleanliness in the hostel. There are various sports in the hostel. The equipment is well-organised and maintained. The Wi-Fi facility is good. Its speed is high.

reviews.review_heading: Never take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is very bad; they don't have canteens. In this college also have water problems in summer days won't found drinking water in college.
Table chairs are always dirty; there is no proper working Wi-Fi; no lab computers are working properly; all computers are there for only showing. You will be amazed to see so many computers, but rarely are any of them useful.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide any placement. It is not an engineering or MBA course that you can get placements from several companies. It is a medical course so they give you a degree and then you have to fight with several exams or pass the interviews in the hospitals to get a job. Some students got placed in foreign countries. Around 10% of the students got internships from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available but not working. They don't even correct it. Labs are good but the quantity of infrastructure is less. Classrooms are good enough but they can be better. The library is small and they don't have enough books for all the students. The books always run out of stock.

review_content.Placements: Placement of this college is good but less companies visited and recruited less students but those who were placed got nearly 3 to 5 Lacs per annum. The highest salary is 40000 per month and low salary is 15000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college and campus is quite good. it also have a nice ambiance and Wi-Fi all over the campus and nice books of collection in library. the computer is also working good at an excellent condition. Over all it has good infrastructure.

answer.text: There are plenty of jobs for fresh Computer Science Engineering graduates. Candidates from top notch engineering colleges get attractive job offers from IT MNCs. CSE course graduates can also get jobs in non-IT companies like universities, research, private and public industries, government departments, business organisations, commercial organisations and the manufacturing sector, etc.You also have plenty of options to work in different departments such as design, development, assembly, manufacture and maintenance, etc. Working as programmer, web developer, and E- commerce specialist with telecommunications companies, automotive companies, aerospace companies, etc. can be a lucrative career option as well. Moreover, numerous national and multi-national computer manufacturing companies, computer hardware system design and development companies, computer networking companies, software development companies, etc. require computer professionals in large numbers.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

review_summary.college_name: Janardan Rai Nagar Rajasthan Vidyapeeth University - JRNRVU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: The university had good placements. About 90% of students got job opportunities. The salary packages offered were average. There is the BHMS MD course. The position of a medical officer, RMO, or assistant position can be provided after passing BHMS. Every hospital needs RMO for IPD. There are many positions in BHMS.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure was available on campus. The hostel and its facilities were good. Course infrastructure was good. Hostel infrastructure was also good and well-mannered. Wi-Fi, lab, and library were available. Proper hygienic surroundings and good quality food were provided.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college offers good learning and experiences.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good because every year very reputed companies visit the campus for recruitment and students have to work hard for that. Around 60% of the students get placed from college. Companies like TCI, ICICI Prudential, Airtel, and Mahindra Finance visit the campus for recruitment. Almost 75% of the students got internships with a stipend of Rs. 5,000 per month - Rs. 10,000 per month. Best roles are offered in our course. Various seminars are also organised in which top businessman visits our college so that students can learn from their experiences.

individual_reviews.course: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good faculty members.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide any placement. It is not an engineering or MBA course that you can get placements from several companies. It is a medical course so they give you a degree and then you have to fight with several exams or pass the interviews in the hospitals to get a job. Some students got placed in foreign countries. Around 10% of the students got internships from this college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available but not working. They don't even correct it. Labs are good but the quantity of infrastructure is less. Classrooms are good enough but they can be better. The library is small and they don't have enough books for all the students. The books always run out of stock.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Best faculty and good ambiance.

content.Placements: Placement of this college is good but less companies visited and recruited less students but those who were placed got nearly 3 to 5 Lacs per annum. The highest salary is 40000 per month and low salary is 15000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college and campus is quite good. it also have a nice ambiance and Wi-Fi all over the campus and nice books of collection in library. the computer is also working good at an excellent condition. Over all it has good infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placement in 2016 and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement are good as big companies like TCI, ICICI Prudential, Mahindra Finance, Airtel, etc. visit the campus. From this college, many students placed successfully. Average salary offered by companies is Rs.30-40K and company offered managerial role in various departments of the company. 90%of the students got internship from college. Highest stipend offered range is Rs. 5-10k per month.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, environment friendly with power backup facilities. Smart classroom, Wi-Fi campus, e-library and sports department facilities are provided. Classroom quality is good. Computer lab is hi-tech with internet connection.

college_info.intro:
Himalayan Group of Professional Institutions popular programmes are BTech, BPharm, and LLB. The institute offers degree courses in full-time mode under various departments such as Himalayan Institute of Engineering & Technology, Himalayan Institute of Pharmacy, HP College of Education, Himalayan Institute of Nursing, etc.
Further, HGPI offers BTech in several specialisations including, Computer Science & Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and many more. These courses are offered at the UG level and have a duration of 4 years. The institute aims to offer unique learning opportunities to students and a plethora of avenues to learn these specific skills. reviews_list.review_title: This college provides students with great placements and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: We have 100 percent placements in our course. Top recruiting companies our college are Mankind, Tirupati, MMG healthcare and Cipla. Many students got internships from these companies and got various roles offered like market representative in research and development.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities and infrastructure in our department including well-equipped labs, classrooms with smart TVs and air conditioned facilities. There is a library with so many books and journals available. The food in the mess is very good and hygienic. There is a canteen along with medical facilities being available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The best college for pharmacy.

individual_reviews.title: Nice infrastructure and teaching staff.

content.Placements: There are around 50 students in my class. The highest package offered to my seniors is around 20 LPA. Top companies are Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Apollo Pharmacy. Around 50-60% of students got internships at Apollo Pharmacy. Roles offered by the course are control analyst, research associate, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are nice, neat, and clean. College is situated in a nice area. There are many labs, classrooms, and library at the college. Canteen food is also awesome. Medical facilities are also available. Sports are also provided to students, and hostel rooms are also good.

The highest package offered is 4.8 Lacs per year and the lowest package is 3 Lacs. All the students get internships from our college in all these reputed companies.

The quality of food is tasty and healthy. The mess area is neat and clean. Medical facilities are also available, if any student gets ill in the hostel, they provide good medical facilities.

admission_overview.college_name: Himalayan Group of Professional Institutions Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility and Application

admission_process.title: HGPI Sirmour Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Himalayan Group of Professional Institutions admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, HPCET, HPU MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. HGPI offers more than 15 courses at UG, PG and diploma levels through seven institutes. The courses are offered in multiple streams such as Management, Pharmacy, Computer Applications, Engineering, etc. Interested candidates can apply forHGPI Sirmouradmissions online.

Himalayan Group of Professional Institutions offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates can apply for the course of their choice by filling out the application form. Below are theHGPI admissionhighlights:
Particulars
HGPI Sirmour Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Diploma
How to apply?
https://hgpi.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Candidates can get admission to most of the courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The institute accepts entrance exams for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, MPharm, etc. Below are popularHGPI coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 in relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category)
The minimum aggregate required is at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST) for admission without entrance test

HGPI admission process includes steps such as registration, selection and admission confirmation. Eligible candidates must first apply for the course of their choice. Below are the steps to get a seat in HGPI:
Step 1: HGPI Application Process 2025
Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on the official website of HGPI. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to register for a course.
Step 2: Selection

The institute shortlists candidates for most of the programmes based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The institute accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as HPU MAT, HPCET, CAT, JEE Main, etc, for admission to specific programmes. Candidates fulfilling the criteria for direct admission will be directly called for document verification.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection process is over, aspirants may need to fill out the admission form. Selected aspirants are called for document verification and counselling. HGPI also offers seats under the Management Quota. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

headings.text: Steps for HGPI Sirmour Admission Process 2025

courses_data.name: HGPI Sirmour BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Himalayan Group of Professional Institutions offers four-year BTech course spread across eight semesters. HGPI offers BTech through the Himalayan Institute of Engineering and Technology (HIET) in various specialisations such asComputer Science Engineering, CSE (AI & ML),Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering andMechanical Engineering. HGPI BTech course is offered in approval byHPTU.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in BTech at HGPI?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who have completed Class 12 or equivalent withPhysicsand Mathematics as compulsory subjects along withChemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for direct admission.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at HGPI?
faqs.answer: HGPI offers four-year BTech programmes. Candidates who have completed Class 12 can apply for BTech course. Below are the BTech specialisations available at HGPI:Computer Science Engineering,CSE (AI & ML),Civil EngineeringElectrical EngineeringMechanical Engineering

faqs.question: Does HGPI offer lateral entry to BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes, HGPI offers lateral entry to BTech programme. Aspirants who have passed Diploma from a recognised board or university or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for candidates belonging to reserved category) can apply for lateral entry.

courses_data.name: HGPI Simour MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:HPU MAT, HPCET, CMAT, CAT
courses_data.description: HGPI Sirmour offers two-year MBA programme through the Himalayan Institute of Management. The institute offers MBA in affiliation with HPTU. Candidates who have passed graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category) can apply for MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at HGPI?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed three-year bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for HGPI MBA programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at HGPI?
faqs.answer: HGPI Sirmour offers two-year MBA programme spread across four semesters. The institute offers MBA through the Himalayan Institute of Management. HGPI offers MBA in affiliation with HPTU. Aspirants who have passed graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category) can apply for MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at HGPI?
faqs.answer: The total fee for HGPI MBA isINR 1.39 lakh. The given fee is a sum of two-year annual fee. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: How can I get seat in HGPI Sirmour?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to fulfil the merit requriements to get a seat in HGPI. The institute accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, HPCET, HPU MAT, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to a few courses. For most of the courses, selection is merit-based. The institute also fills some seats through the Management Quota. Selected candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at HGPI?
faqs.answer: HGPI admissions are currently open. Candidates meeting the eligibility requirements can apply for any of the UG or PG courses. Aspirants must also check the selection requirements for their preferred course. The selection for most of the courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for HGPI admissions?
faqs.answer: Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria to apply for any UG or PG programmes of HGPI. Below is the eligibility criteria for popular HGPI courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 in relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category)The minimum aggregate required is at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST) for admission without entrance testMBA3-year bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BBAClass 12 from any recognised board with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)BCAClass 12 with at least 40% aggregate (35% aggregate for SC/ ST)

hostel_campus.college_name: Himalayan Group of Professional Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are two hostels for boys and a separate hostel for girls. The mess of each hostel is equipped with modern facilities. Each hostel has a Residential Warden under the direction of chief warden ensures implementation of discipline and creation of an atmosphere that is conducive to learning. Spacious and well-ventilated rooms with adequate furniture and cupboards are available to provide the students with a homely environment. Girls Hostel is located within the campus and has facilities for indoor games. Special arrangements have been made for the safety, security and privacy of the girls residing in the hostel. To cater to the requirement of increased intake, further storeys have been added to Girls Hostel this year. Boys’ hostels are located in the campus and have facilities for outdoor games like badminton, volleyball, basketball and cricket.

library.description: Institute has an automated central library covering an area of 900m square. A large number of reference books, national and international journals on the variety of subjects are also available which assist in processing information and updating knowledge. The library is fully computerized and embellished with wi-fi zone with photocopy and printing facilities. The digital section provides the students with audio/ video CDs & CBT’s. Library services can be availed round the clock. ERP Software has also been instituted in the library system.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Volley Ball, Basket Ball, Badminton, Lawn Tennis, Football, Cricket, Hand Ball, Scatting, Ring Throw Ball, Long Jump, Shot Put, Athletics, Kho-Kho, Kabaddi, Wrestling, Hockey, Track, Table- Tennis

review_summary.college_name: Shri Venkateshwara University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied and happy here.

content.Placements: Nearly about 97% of students got passed. I think 87% was the highest there in my batch. But they offered good internship opportunities. Mostly everyone joined them too and gave me the opportunity to join other big industry tycoons and had a meet up with them.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was pretty good with a huge campus. Classes were also good to be sit there even for the whole day. They provided us with mostly every equipment needed for the practical. Most loved thing was the neat and clean environment all over there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty members. Infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: All 250 students got placed from course. The highest is no limit but the lowest is 13 LPA. Students themselves get their further education by NEET PG. 100% of students of MBBS got internships. We are provided with a family adoption program which surely enhances our communication skills.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are equipped with AC and lecture hall with projector and electronic podium. Ground is available with multiple playable games like cricket, football, etc. Canteen is available with 24/7 supply of milk and eatables. Hostel facility is available with AC rooms, laundry, and sweeper facilities. Rooms are better than any college in NCR.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for top and average students.

content.Placements: My percentage is 78% in B.Sc. mathematics. The salary package depends on marks and interviews. MNCs and IT companies hire our college students and provide the best packages. Companies like LTI, TCS, Accenture, IBM, Oracle, Infosys, and Microsoft visit our college. It is the best university for all students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides the best facilities like classrooms and a well-maintained library. The hostel facility, a canteen, medical facilities, and sports are very good.
content.Faculty: Higher teaching quality often correlates with engaging lessons, practical applications of knowledge, and support for students' learning styles. Seek feedback from current or past students about their experiences in class. Programs that offer hands-on projects, internships, and interactions with industry professionals typically prepare students better for the workforce. Check if there are any capstone projects or case studies included in the curriculum. Teachers always help students with any doubt questions. They never say no to any problems.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements really good infrastructure and facilities .

content.Placements: In Shri Venketeshwara university, Internship is compulsory for all students who pursuing MBBS for 1 year and they give stipend 12000 per month. Approximately 50 percentage students get job and the highest and average package offer and after MBBS course, we can apply anywhere for job in any hospital.
content.Infrastructure: It has a good infrastructure and they provide us free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and gym. Faculty is good, calm, polite we can ask any doubts related to topics without any fear or hesitation. They are very cooperative .

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with teachers and good placements for 2015, and the packages are good.

Companies like Morgan Stanley on the other hand, the top Indian companies at Tata Consultancy Services, Reliance, Cognizant, Wipro, ICICI Bank, etc.

faqs.question: How can candidates join SVU - Shri Venkateshwara University?
faqs.answer: Marks are determined using the combined IPE+AP EAMCET results. To acquire the rank under 5000 needed to get a free seat at SV UNIVERSITY, you need to score higher than 105+. Eamcet qualifying marks are 60, and there is no minimum score requirement for candidates who have reservations. Candidates must take the SVUCET entrance exam, which is offered by Sri Venkateswara University, to be considered for admission to all PG programs with the exception of the M.B.A. and M.C.A. programs.

hostel.description: University has a separate hostel for both boys and girls. The rooms are available in single, double,three and four occupancy basis. 24*7 power and water supply is available. Security guards are available round the clock.Hot water is supplied during the winter. Water coolers are attached with R.O. installed on each floor.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied and happy here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was pretty good with a huge campus. Classes were also good to be sit there even for the whole day. They provided us with mostly every equipment needed for the practical. Most loved thing was the neat and clean environment all over there.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty members. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with AC and lecture hall with projector and electronic podium. Ground is available with multiple playable games like cricket, football, etc. Canteen is available with 24/7 supply of milk and eatables. Hostel facility is available with AC rooms, laundry, and sweeper facilities. Rooms are better than any college in NCR.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for top and average students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best facilities like classrooms and a well-maintained library. The hostel facility, a canteen, medical facilities, and sports are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements really good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure and they provide us free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and gym. Faculty is good, calm, polite we can ask any doubts related to topics without any fear or hesitation. They are very cooperative .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers and good placements for 2015, and the packages are good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostels were nearby. Attach various infrastructure facilities as common television, telephone, tables, and chairs sector. They were modern gym, and sports equipment was provided. it also provides an auditorium, and medical centers were available.

reviews.review_heading: College is still under construction, not good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, workshops, library, gym, great classrooms, nice faculty, canteen was good and food there is great, there's a medical institution inside, games like basketball football indoors game like table tennis etc. and no AC's in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for medical sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice as the university is only 8 years old. It is trying to expand. It is situated near NH 24, near Moradabad in a lush green environment. The area is very nice, and it is located far away from the city, in Holy Ganges Plateau. So, lots and lots of greenery is present.

reviews.review_heading: It is a hub of education and opportunities. Come, learn and get rewarded talent.
reviews.review_text: The university is built on a huge area. The infrastructure of the university is good. There are well-equipped classrooms and computer laboratory. There is a mini library to exploit the knowledge. The quality of food is only a bit of concern. Apart from that, hostel, sports and facilities are up to mark. Events, fests and campus crowd are poor. It needs to be highlighted in terms of reputation.

A very good university campus with experienced faculty and good options for placements. Also good for enjoying your life along with studies. Very comfortable college timings and lots more. Good library facility, along with sports and gym facility. The hospital also available for free of cost. A very good university campus with experienced faculty and good options for placements. Also good for enjoying your life along with studies. Very comfortable college timings and lots more. Good library facility, along with sports and gym facility. The hospital also available for free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Great placement and good facilities, but it is a mixed bag with faculty disappointments.
reviews.review_text: Shri Venkateshwara University has many courses like MBBS, B.Pharma, Diploma, B.Ed, etc. The hostels are very beautiful with separate rooms for two people per room, and boys and girls are not mixed in the rooms. The mess food is really good, and the canteen is unique. Many games are played daily.

reviews.review_heading: Short view of shri Venketeshwar university .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and development is good which is more attractive and development of the class. As the class walls are well cleaned and maintained with different types of attractive paints. As the furniture is good and the single student can sit by on one chair as they made separate furniture.

reviews.review_heading: Iiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiii.
reviews.review_text: I think the placement of my college is about 1 percent. And I think package offered in my college is about 1 to 1.5 lac. No top companies hire in it and the hire companies are local. Is to get a degree. Don't take admission in this for regular base classes.

reviews.review_heading: An Average College for Average Students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is still developing. Faculty members are below average. The college is not as per the expectations of studious students. One should try other colleges in Noida. The atmosphere is not up to the mark, the crowd consists of village people.

review_content.Placements: Placements are conducted but some of the companies do not contact the university after conducting interviews (garuda aerospace company, a drone based company). International internships are however offered by full funding from ICAR to philipines, canada, taiwan, South korea, etc. Getting placed in interview depends upon how u write the exam and perform in interview, and also category based sometimes, and you should be passed in all the subjects wrote in previous semester.
review_content.Infrastructure: Some of our classrooms are monuments that are running since ages. They were build by britishes. Classrooms have step wise benches and desks and are spacious. Wi-Fi available in classrooms Hostels are good but are somewhat less spacious. Wi-Fi available, RO water available, geyser available, 24*7 ambulance available.

reviews_list.batch_info: (DISCONTINUED JULY 2023)B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good teachers and infrastructure but not satisfied because of laboratories and semester.

review_content.Placements: From our seniors, one-third get placed in good companies. Some pursue higher education. The average salary pacakge offered ranges from 4 LPA - 5 LPA as a fresher. Companies like Tata, John Deere, and Ashirvad recruit students from the course. Students can be placed as a trainee, field officers, or directly as agricultural engineer in top companies and even in government sectors.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi facilities and well-facilitated classrooms. Library can be afforded anytime from 8.00 AM to 6.00 PM. There are laboratories for every department, but they could be maintained better. Students can learn practically better through laboratories and workshops. The hostel rooms are well ventilated and there are 2-3 in a room. The mess is handled by students and so students can get good food. The canteen is not maintained well. There is a college dispensary that is open 24X7. For severe conditions, the students are taken immediately to the nearby government hospital.

review_content.Infrastructure: There no such good facility provided here and even library gets close by 5:30 PM. On sunday or any holiday college canteen, indoor satdium everything remains close. This college in outskrit area, so tourist places nearby and not even songke shop nearby.

faqs.answer: The BTech Agricultural Engineering syllabus is not similar for all colleges and universities in India. Every institution has a certain set of curriculum guidelines that they follow and set the syllabus in that manner. But, the general topics covered in Agricultural Engineering classes are usually the same.Some important concepts include agricultural processes in industries, farm machinery, surveying methods, soil investigation, tools and control of machinery, horticulture and field crops. You will get a good hang of the field after you pursue a BTech degree course in this field that covers both theoretical as well technical aspects. Know more about -Agricultural Engineering

hostel.description:
Hostel facilities are available for both undergraduate and postgraduate students separately.
Hostels for boys and girls are housed at two different premises.
The hostel is well furnished with furniture, modern kitchen and hygiene toilets.
Both the hostels are provided with a wifi facility for accessing internet with a bandwidth of 12 Mbps.
Boys undergraduate hostel has 40 rooms and girls undergraduate hostel has 52 rooms.Each room can accommodate 3 persons.
Boys post graduate hostel has 17 rooms and girls postgraduate hostel has 13 rooms. Each room can accommodate 2 persons.
Students manage all the functional activities of the hostel and the mess bill is based on the dividing the total expenditure incurred each month. Hence, the mess is run with very low monthly rates by the students at the same time without compromising the quality of food.

Hostel facilities are available for both undergraduate and postgraduate students separately.
Hostels for boys and girls are housed at two different premises.
The hostel is well furnished with furniture, modern kitchen and hygiene toilets.
Both the hostels are provided with a wifi facility for accessing internet with a bandwidth of 12 Mbps.
Boys undergraduate hostel has 40 rooms and girls undergraduate hostel has 52 rooms.Each room can accommodate 3 persons.
Boys post graduate hostel has 17 rooms and girls postgraduate hostel has 13 rooms. Each room can accommodate 2 persons.
Students manage all the functional activities of the hostel and the mess bill is based on the dividing the total expenditure incurred each month. Hence, the mess is run with very low monthly rates by the students at the same time without compromising the quality of food.

Some of our classrooms are monuments that are running since ages. They were build by britishes. Classrooms have step wise benches and desks and are spacious. Wi-Fi available in classrooms
Hostels are good but are somewhat less spacious. Wi-Fi available, RO water available, geyser available,  24*7 ambulance available.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good teachers and infrastructure but not satisfied because of laboratories and semester.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi facilities and well-facilitated classrooms. Library can be afforded anytime from 8.00 AM to 6.00 PM. The hostel rooms are well ventilated and there are 2-3 in a room. The mess is handled by students and so students can get good food. The canteen is not maintained well. There is a college dispensary that is open 24X7. For...

reviews.review_text: There no such good facility provided here and even library gets close by 5:30 PM. On sunday or any holiday college canteen, indoor satdium everything remains close. This college in outskrit area, so tourist places nearby and not even songke shop nearby.

individual_reviews.title: Honest review of ITM Vocational University.

content.Placements: Not that good or not that bad for placement; it totally depends on how active the student is and how they perform throughout their academic journey. It also depends on the course and its value in the market. There are multiple factors that matter for placement, but overall, it provides average placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite small, but it has all types of sports grounds like cricket, football, volleyball, and basketball, along with all types of sports equipment. There is a canteen and two tuck shops, as well as a robotics lab, seminar hall, and all basic amenities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Nice college with good faculty and top placements.

content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good and helpful in my course. There are good libraries where we can find books that we need. The classrooms are very well mannered. The labs are very good and big; there are so many machines for our understanding. There is only a girls’ hostel on campus; the boys’ hostel is 30 km away from the college. The food quality is good in the mess. The medical facilities are available in our college. There are also lectures for our sports activities.

placement_data.title: ITM Vocational University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The training and placement department of ITM Vocational University plays a pivotal role in building a strong industry-academia tie-up. ITMVU placement cell provides all the placement-related training such as aptitude tests, GDs, and mock interview sessions, among several other job-oriented training programmes required for the campus placement process.

ITM Vocational University (also known as ITM University) recorded an overall placement rate of 100% in the academic year 2022-2023. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during ITM Vocational University placements in 2023 stood at INR 12 LPA . More than 950 recruiters participated during ITM University Vadodara placements in 2023 and placed students in various new-age job roles. The top recruiters of ITM Vocational University in 2023 included Property Pistol, Thomas Cook, Lenskart, Wipro, Infosys, L&T, Amazon, LG, Deloitte, Reliance Digital, JP Morgan, Flipkart, HDFC Bank, Voltas, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: ITM Vocational University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of ITM Vocational University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite small, but it has all types of sports grounds like cricket, football, volleyball, and basketball, along with all types of sports equipment. There is a canteen and two tuck shops, as well as a robotics lab, seminar hall, and all basic amenities.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with good faculty and top placements.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities are very good and helpful in my course. 
There are good libraries where we can find books that we need. 
The classrooms are very well mannered. 
The labs are very good and big; there are so many machines for our understanding. 
There is only a girls’ hostel on campus; the boys’ hostel is 30 km away from the college. 
The food quality is good in the mess. 
The medical facilities are available in our college. 
There are also lectures for our sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Brilliant college. Please do visit to study.
reviews.review_text: A well-equipped library, a good hostel, well-functioning labs and IIT-type classrooms, interactive rooms, classrooms, a sports academy, tutorial rooms, medical rooms, air-conditioned classes, and good functioning bus facilities are available. Good, hygienic food is available in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: In 2021, the salary package offered was 12 LPA by TCS.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are good. Girls' hostels are available on campus, and boys' hostels are available outside the campus. Hostels are average. The quality of the food in the mess is average. Sports grounds are available for games like cricket, football, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ITM Vocational University.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the best facilities like high-tech labs, playgrounds, a hygienic canteen, etc. Our college provides a bus facility for students who stay in remote areas. The bus drivers are friendly and trustable. Students are satisfied with all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ITM Vocational University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, etc. The food served in the canteen is good. They provide medical, sports, and games facilities. Our department has Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has good catering services, high internet access, a gym, a proper projector, and smart boards are equipped. A wide range of indoor and outdoor sports are available for students. Playground is available for sports like cricket. Our college has volleyball and basketball courts. There is a huge library in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for this course of industrial Chemistry is pretty fine. In our college the facilities of Wi-Fi is working, We have well settled classrooms, labs, library, cafeteria. We have nice facilities for the student of their staying that is hostels. The food available is very hygienic and of good quality, We have medical facilities and along with academics we got to learn about other facilities such as sports, presentation, and communication skills.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members and placements of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Separate hostels are available for both girls and boys. The library and laboratories are well organised. The food quality is better. Along with academics, this college makes us perfect in extracurricular activities such as sports, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members, courses, industrial visits, and internships.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Laboratories are well-equipped. The food quality is better, and it is regularly checked by the food management department. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college is small. Our college doesn't provide good facilities. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. We have network issues. We have classrooms. The benches are not good. They don't provide a suitable playground to play games.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. The girls' hostel is situated in the college. The boys' hostel is situated far away from the college. Our college has a canteen. They provide sports facilities. They conduct sports programs.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good.
reviews.review_text: I personally feel that my college has good infrastructure, both interior and exterior, and all the necessary facilities. There are many societies in college, so you can develop your skills according to your student's skills and interests, and the hostel facilities are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to achieve your goals.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good infrastructure and facilities. We have good Wi-Fi and classrooms. The library has all kinds of books. Our college provides good food. It provides good medical facilities. We have all sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ITM Vocational University.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a separate workshop. It has all high-tech labs with advanced machines. We have multiple computer labs. They have proper systems. There is a library on the campus where students can borrow the required books. Classrooms are good. Sports facilities are not much good.

reviews_list.review_title: NETES Mirza is under Nemcare Group of Institions.

review_content.Placements: The placements are good on the campus. Every year, our students got selected in many companies like HP, BSNL, Airtel, TCL, etc., with good salary package. The placement depends on your skills, so don't worry about it. Try to improve your soft skills, and you'll crack it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good on the campus. The campus is one of the largest among the private colleges in Assam. There is a large playground for outdoor games. The campus is full of greenery, and it is quiet and peaceful. The canteen is also available on the campus. There is a big library, where every kind of book is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Proud to be a part of NITS Mirza family.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is average. The placement cell is headed by Mr Rupam Nath. This year 3-4 companies visited the campus. However, many didn't appear for the interviews because the companies are offering low CTC. Selected candidates will soon be placed in various parts of the country at various posts by the companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms have projector facilities for interactive learning. The computer lab has around 50 computers with access to 24/7 high-speed internet. The mechanical and electrical lab has sophisticated machines and electrical & electronics equipment for learning purpose. The lab can be accessed by the students all the time.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Disappointed because of management and placements

review_content.Placements: In my batch, the placement is zero and in senior batches, there were 3 or 5 placements but the company was fake. Overall, there is no placement here. Every semester, the placement officer is changed but there is no use as not a single company visits, so poor placement facilities. Students have to search for jobs on their own. There is no internship from the college side and ultimately, students got no stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility. labs are okay but we cannot use the computer lab because, most of the days in the month, there are online exams like entrance exams, online job interviews, etc. so it is used mostly by outsiders than students. The classroom, the library and medical facilities are somewhat okay but you will not get all the book available in the library of your course, if by luck any book is available, you will get 1 or 2 copies. There is a field for sports but the authority didn't allow us to organize the sports week, only cows are allowed to graze there. The food in the canteen is good and hostel rooms are perfect.

individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend students to take admission in it.

content.Placements: Around 18% of students were placed in this course. There was no average package, and no company came to hire students, not even the worst companies came to recruit. There were no students who got internships. Some students searched for paid internships themselves, but cannot expect top roles when there were just 3-4 teachers to teach all the subjects in the course.
content.Infrastructure: There was a good computer laboratory, and an average LAN internet. The classrooms were good, clean, and large. The library was average, but no books were available outside of the syllabus. I was a day scholar, so I do not know about hostel facilities, but I heard that the food was not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: NETES Mirza is under Nemcare Group of Institions.

content.Placements: The placements are good on the campus. Every year, our students got selected in many companies like HP, BSNL, Airtel, TCL, etc., with good salary package. The placement depends on your skills, so don't worry about it. Try to improve your soft skills, and you'll crack it.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good on the campus. The campus is one of the largest among the private colleges in Assam. There is a large playground for outdoor games. The campus is full of greenery, and it is quiet and peaceful. The canteen is also available on the campus. There is a big library, where every kind of book is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Proud to be a part of NITS Mirza family.

content.Placements: The placement cell is average. The placement cell is headed by Mr Rupam Nath. This year 3-4 companies visited the campus. However, many didn't appear for the interviews because the companies are offering low CTC. Selected candidates will soon be placed in various parts of the country at various posts by the companies.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms have projector facilities for interactive learning. The computer lab has around 50 computers with access to 24/7 high-speed internet. The mechanical and electrical lab has sophisticated machines and electrical & electronics equipment for learning purpose. The lab can be accessed by the students all the time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Disappointed because of management and placements

content.Placements: In my batch, the placement is zero and in senior batches, there were 3 or 5 placements but the company was fake. Overall, there is no placement here. Every semester, the placement officer is changed but there is no use as not a single company visits, so poor placement facilities. Students have to search for jobs on their own. There is no internship from the college side and ultimately, students got no stipend.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility. labs are okay but we cannot use the computer lab because, most of the days in the month, there are online exams like entrance exams, online job interviews, etc. so it is used mostly by outsiders than students. The classroom, the library and medical facilities are somewhat okay but you will not get all the book available in the library of your course, if by luck any book is available, you will get 1 or 2 copies. There is a field for sports but the authority didn't allow us to organize the sports week, only cows are allowed to graze there. The food in the canteen is good and hostel rooms are perfect.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2013

content.Other: An average college for Engineering. Lovely environment. Wonderful locality. I got admitted in this college in 2009. Being the pioneer batch of the college, we had to compromise many facilities which my friends are getting in other college. But one thing I have to admit about the special GATE classes. Superb teacher. Super class for it. About placement, being the pioneer, we suffered the most. A few just got through campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, Cambridge institute of technology is good.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 2019 batch, and my course is BE in Computer Science. Placements are not that great; placement was offered to 20 percent students. The highest package would be around 8-10 LPA. Lowest would be 2-4 LPA. The average would be 4-5 LPA. IBM, TCS, Infosys, etc. are the top recruiters. The top role offered in my course is software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not that great, and construction is going on building another block. There is always a network problem in the college. Labs, classrooms, and libraries are comparatively okay. The quality of the facilities that we get in the hostel is okay, and the food is not that great.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Nice college with all facilities and infrastructure .

review_content.Placements: The percentage here are good a lot of companies come our college for placement recruitment; more than 40 students are placed in every batch class. The highest package of our course is 17 LPA and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA The average package offered is 17 LPA. HP, Capgemini, Meta, Cognizant, LinkedIn and IBM are among the top recruiting companies. More than 60 to 80% of students are placed for internships. Our college is well known for good placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are all facilities available here; there is no problem on campus, and of course, they teach well or with teachers. It's a good college where we have parking facilities, a library, a gym and many other facilities with internet connections and broadband. We also have hostel facilities and we have a large field where we play cricket, volleyball, tennis, football, and running tracks. Hostel mess food is not very good but canteen food is good.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good option for B.E. in Computer Science in Bangalore.

content.Placements: About 85% of students are placed here. More than 1,000 recruiters come and offer multiple job opportunities. The average package is 7 LPA and the highest goes up to 53 LPA. Overall, the placement is good, and the college provides enough placement and internship opportunities for all students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good enough, and all the required facilities are there, like the library, classrooms, a huge auditorium, seminar hall, sports room, and gym. All of these help students' overall growth in every aspect. So, it's good.

individual_reviews.title: The campus was totally disappointing. There are no transportation facilities.

content.Placements: Very few people got selected in campus selection. Most of the pass-out batches did not get jobs. The computer science course will get college placements. The highest package is 3 lacs per annum, and the least package is 1 lac per annum. It is selected based on the percentage on the inter degree.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was too bad; it is almost one floor, with a very poor signal. The classrooms are sufficient for students. Wi-Fi is available but only for college management people, and the hostel food was very bad, and maintenance of the hostel was bad; there was no cleaning of rooms.

hostel_campus.college_name: Cambridge Institute of Technology North Campus

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good option for B.E. in Computer Science in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good enough, and all the required facilities are there, like the library, classrooms, a huge auditorium, seminar hall, sports room, and gym. All of these help students' overall growth in every aspect. So, it's good.

reviews.review_heading: The campus was totally disappointing. There are no transportation facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was too bad; it is almost one floor, with a very poor signal. The classrooms are sufficient for students. Wi-Fi is available but only for college management people, and the hostel food was very bad, and maintenance of the hostel was bad; there was no cleaning of rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, Cambridge institute of technology is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that great, and construction is going on building another block. There is always a network problem in the college. Labs, classrooms, and libraries are comparatively okay. The quality of the facilities that we get in the hostel is okay, and the food is not that great.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with all facilities and infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: There are all facilities available here; there is no problem on campus, and of course, they teach well or with teachers. It's a good college where we have parking facilities, a library, a gym and many other facilities with internet connections and broadband. We also have hostel facilities and we have a large field where we play cricket, volleyball, tennis, football, and running tracks. Hostel mess food is not very good but canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college with really good placements. Infrastructure is too good.
reviews.review_text:
The faculty's are well experienced. The infrastructure is good. The canteen is not available. The hostel mess is not too good, and there will be no food delivery available to that location.
The faculty members encourage students to participate in all the activities, like sports, games, dance, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college to pursue engineering and has many courses to offer.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is great and well trained. All the basic facilities are available and they are being developed further. There is a Samsung innovation lab at the college. A hostel facility is also available. All extra-curricular activities are encouraged and appreciated.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college with the best teaching.
reviews.review_text: We have the best infrastructure and course facilities, such as high-bandwidth Internet access, a newly equipped lab and library, and a classroom. The facilities in our hostel are best equipped equipped equipped with hot water, current, and Wi-Fi. The hostel food is not good in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Don't even dare to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The college has one of the worst infrastructures possible, with no mobile signal on campus at all. Hostels are bad due to a lack of facilities. Wi-Fi facility is also very bad, and the hostel food is equally bad. Washrooms are cleaned only once every 10 days.

reviews.review_heading: There is no good infrastructure if you want to take admission here don't go to hostel you can do PG.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is below average here college building is average but hostel is very bad Wi-Fi is not working ( like here is very poor network) food is very poor not worth of the hostel feels and faculty is not good they cook so bad and they put unnecessary rules they will not leave you out on college working day and on Saturday and Sunday you have to take permission to go out and has to come before 5:00 pm there are so many unnecessary rules here.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty good placements in 2018 .
reviews.review_text:
There is a Wi-Fi labs library with spacious 
And classroom is also big 
We have a huge ground to play cricket kabbadi throw ball and its full of greenary surrounded by college where we can sit in the garden have fun or have food together with friends .

reviews.review_heading: Merits and demerits of the college.
reviews.review_text: The institute still has a long way to go. But as far as teaching and studies it's good. The signal around the college is entirely wrong. There is a small bakery and you won't find any shops in around 1-2 kilometres. The mess food is also not quite good, as I heard from the hoteliers. And one good thing is the bus fare is free for the 1st year due to covid.

reviews.review_heading: It was very good college for our future.
reviews.review_text: My college hostal has everything what each and every student wants. Food is super each and every one like that food. Food quality is was super we north students and south students every one like that food. Food taste also very good. Rooms also good. Toilets also very good. Every one like that toilets maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: You can come here if you want good college in low fee this college is still in the making.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is not so good nor so bad, but it's under construction and will be good in few years.
Hostel and food facility are very good. 
We need not to buy any books, college provide the books for the semester for free, after the semester ends we need to return these books.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the good colleges in Bangalore. Value for the money that we are paying.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are under development and they have facilities like CCTV surveillance, high-speed Wi-Fi, all classrooms are completely attached with projectors, spacious classrooms, and high ventilation is there. Hostel food is also good with high nutrients.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Trichy Engineering College offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Trichy Engineering College offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: I got good friends and teachers. Sorry not a teachers we all are good friends. This is our relationship. Otherwise college is good and everyday enjoyed. Low level of fees. All kinds of people can studied. I am student of Electrical department the lectures are the excellent man of kindness. Thank you for giving time to remember my self.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: No Campus placements. No one speaks good English. Not having experienced faculty members. Does not has good Infrastructure. In one word not a good college to study. This is a private institution not a Government one. Please don't get cheated by its name. Worst laboratories. Only few staff members are aware about what they are doing. Namely, Beevi Mam(physics), Raja Sir(Chemistry), Prabavathy(Dept. of CSE), Nathan(Math), Raja(Math), Nithya(Math). If you are lucky and if these staff members are there in the college you will be lucky enough to gain some knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with placements but infrastructure and facilities are very good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 5% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA. The average salary package offered was 2.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies were BMW and Benz. Around 20% of students got internships at Ashok Leyland and Tata Industries. The top role offered was engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was no Wi-Fi in our department. Laboratories, classrooms, and libraries were very good. Hostel facilities were better. The food served in the mess was average. Canteen was available. Medical facilities were not provided. Sports and games were not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: The worst college for Engineering.

content.Placements: No placements for any Department. Even they won't arrange a placements from atleast mid range companies. The worst in placements. My senior batch doesn't get any placements and that too happened for my batch students also. They won't arrange Internship also because they are the worst figure in placements. Placement cell is there but no use of it always closed.
content.Infrastructure: Lengthy building. They don't have proper toilet. Labs are in good conditions. In classrooms they won't have fan for students. Overall maintenance is not good. In summer season we can't Even sit inside a classroom, bad maintenance and the worst infrastructure. Library is best. Sports is the worst because of that faculty.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: I got good friends and teachers. Sorry not a teachers we all are good friends. This is our relationship. Otherwise college is good and everyday enjoyed. Low level of fees. All kinds of people can studied. I am student of Electrical department the lectures are the excellent man of kindness. Thank you for giving time to remember my self.
