If you are lucky and if these staff members are there in the college you will be lucky enough to gain some knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with placements but infrastructure and facilities are very good.

content.Placements: Almost 5% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA. The average salary package offered was 2.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies were BMW and Benz. Around 20% of students got internships at Ashok Leyland and Tata Industries. The top role offered was engineer.
content.Infrastructure: There was no Wi-Fi in our department. Laboratories, classrooms, and libraries were very good. Hostel facilities were better. The food served in the mess was average. Canteen was available. Medical facilities were not provided. Sports and games were not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: I suggest students to concentrate on practical than technical.

content.Placements: More than 65% of students got placed in our course at reputed companies. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA and the lowest salary package was 1.2 LPA. TCS, Wipro, Zoho, and Accenture were the companies that offered placements. Some core companies like TVS, Bosch, and Electrical companies also offered placements. Around 20% of students got internships in our course. Maintenance and management roles were offered by core companies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and lab facilities were provided. Bus facility was provided for students around 30 km. Hostel food was average which was based on the menu. The library was available and had books from local to international authors and computer browsing for learning purposes.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and lab facilities were provided. Bus facility was provided for students around 30 km. Hostel food was average which was based on the menu. The library was available and had books from local to international authors and computer browsing for learning purposes.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with supportive teachers and good placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides good placement offers. Companies from Ahmednagar, Supa, and Pune visit our college. Our teachers guide us to apply for off-campus placements. CG Klassic Wheel, TCS, etc., visit our college. Many design companies visit our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus provides Wi-Fi, a digital library, a good canteen, a RO water cooler, CCTVs, etc. The hostel is very good, hygienic, and well-maintained. The mess provides good food.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are very helpful and supportive. They help us a lot. They help us in our studies and projects. They have a lot of knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for students.

review_content.Placements: Our college is very good. The highest salary package offered was 7 LPA. Internships are also offered to good students. Top recruiting companies visit our college to hire students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is huge. It has a big playground. Laboratory is available. Many games are conducted, and there is a medical room for players as well.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are good in all activities like study, sports, and events. The teaching quality is good. Unit tests are also conducted. Semester exams are tough. The passing criteria for exams depend on the paper.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the fees charged by the college. They are very affordable for students.

content.Placements: Our batch passed out in 2022. There was a placement drive every year. Over 300 companies visit annually, and many students take part in it and get jobs through this drive. On average, 60% of students got jobs or internships. Various roles were offered in our college placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms, modern labs, and high-speed Wi-Fi ensures an ideal learning environment. Comfortable hostel facilities with 24/7 security, clean rooms, and healthy meals provide a home-like experience for students. Feels very friendly.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Facilities are available for the students. The quality of these facilities is good.

content.Placements: In our college, nearly 70% of students were placed in this course. The highest package offered was 7 LPA, with an average package of 2-3 LPA. Companies from Ahmednagar, Supa, and Pune visit our college. Top recruiting companies like Tata, Infosys, and TCS come to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: The campus provides Wi-Fi, a central library, a good canteen, a RO water cooler, sports material, etc. The hostel is good and well-maintained, and the mess provides healthy food. There is a medical room for players. Every year, a number of sports events are organized.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with supportive teachers and good placements.

content.Infrastructure: The campus provides Wi-Fi, a digital library, a good canteen, a RO water cooler, CCTVs, etc. The hostel is very good, hygienic, and well-maintained. The mess provides good food.
content.Faculty: All teachers are very helpful and supportive. They help us a lot. They help us in our studies and projects. They have a lot of knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for students.

content.Placements: Our college is very good. The highest salary package offered was 7 LPA. Internships are also offered to good students. Top recruiting companies visit our college to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is huge. It has a big playground. Laboratory is available. Many games are conducted, and there is a medical room for players as well.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are good in all activities like study, sports, and events. The teaching quality is good. Unit tests are also conducted. Semester exams are tough. The passing criteria for exams depend on the paper.

College environment is also good for learning.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gharda Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: In my opinion, I loved the facilities and infrastructure of my college, but I think Wi-Fi issues occur sometimes. Labs are well-equipped, classrooms are okay, and the library is stocked with various types of engineering books for my department. I am not in the hostel, but my friends told me the hostel food is good.

reviews.review_heading: My computer engineering college review.
reviews.review_text: Computer engineering department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, a good library, and access to industry resources, ensuring practical learning and research support. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, average mess food, canteen options, basic medical support, and sports facilities for cricket, football, and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: My college review of Chemical Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our department had Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well equipped labs, computer centers, and a rich library with digital resources. It also provided both academic and research support to students. The hostel was well maintained with clean rooms, a hygienic mess, and canteen food. We had basic medical aid and tie ups with the hospital. Sports grounds and indoor games promoted recreation and fitness among students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gharda Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, the canteen is the worst. Wi-Fi works sometimes well, not always. Classrooms are good, and the library has all the books available, so we can study. I am not in a hostel, but my friends told me that hostel facilities are good. The mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty members and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the college are excellent, like Wi-Fi, student library, labs, and top-notch classrooms, including the facility to 3D print any object you want, as the 3D printer is available in our department. The mess in the hostel is excellent; sometimes it's good, but most of the time, there is no question about the mess. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are available to play. The gym is also available.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college. All the necessary facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: Computer Engineering Department has several labs with computers equipped with relevant software. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, whiteboards (in some classrooms) and sufficient benches for students. College campus also has a canteen providing food at decent prices.

reviews.review_heading: This institute provides many good scores in CET. Those students were also eligible for scholarships.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at this institute is good. It has free Wi-Fi, and the labs are well-equipped and were recently modified. The library is great and a student-friendly place. There are separate rooms for girls and boys to study. There is also a counseling room where the counselor can help us with our problems.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are very good. Wi-Fi is available in both the college and the hostel for students to use while studying. Classrooms are very neat and clean. The CCTV is all over campus. The labs are very good, with separate teachers. In the library, all books are available. A huge ground is available for playing games.

paragraphs: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.

The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

Renaissance University popular programmes are BSc and BTech. The university provides a cutting-edge curriculum with a blend of both practicals and theory. The university provides hands-on learning to students through lab work, projects, and industry training. Renaissance University Indore provides research opportunities to students through various workshops, seminars, and projects.
Renaissance University BTech students are placed in top companies such as HDFC Ergo, Kotak Mahindra Bank, ICICI Bank, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Renaissance University and their respective eligibility and the Renaissance University fee structure:

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Renaissance University?

faqs.answer: A:    Renaissance University offers good placements annually for courses like MBA, MCA and BCA, etc. in 2024, over 300 recruiters participated and presented various placements to the batch 2024. The key highlights of Renaissance University placements for the Class of 2024 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2024)Highest package (international)INR 13.30 LPAHighest package (national)INR 5.75 LPATotal recruiters300+NOTE: The placement data year was not mentioned in the official pla
faqs.question: How are the placements at Renaissance University?

faqs.answer: A:    MBA graduates from Renaissance University earn more on average.According to sources, the average package was around INR 5 LPA (Lakh Per Year) in 2022. The rate may increase to INR 9 LPA by 2023. The highest reported bundle may be significantly be INR13 LPA in 2023.
faqs.question: What is the average package for MBA students at Renaissance University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes,  Renaissance University Indore offers decent placements annually for courses like BTech, MTech, BBA, LLB, etc. As per the latest report, the highest national and international packages offered during Renaissance University placements in 2024 stood at INR 5.75 LPA and INR 13.30 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters of Renaissance University Indore in 2024 included Aditya Birla Group, ICICI Bank, HDFC Ergo, Kotak Mahindra Bank, etc.
faqs.question: Is Renaissance University Indore good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Renaissance University in Indore provides a three-year BSc programme to students. To be eligible, applicants must have class 12 scores with 45% aggregate from a recognised board. Please refer to the table below for information on Renaissance University's BSc eligibility, fees:ParametersDetailsCourseBScEligibilityEligibility: Class 12 with 45%Selection: Merit-basedTotal Tuition FeesINR 75,000 - INR 4.5 lakhNOTE: The mentioned data is from external sources. Hence, it may vary.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Renaissance University BSc?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to its undergraduate and graduate programs in Renaissance University, including the MBA program, the University accepts scores from the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam. This is the only option to enter this college, they do not provide any other alternative option for admissions. You have to give Pearson Undergraduate Entrance examination.It is compulsory for each applicants wherever from his or she is.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Renaissance University accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    No, Renaissance University does not accept CLAT results for enrollment in any of its courses. National Law Universities (NLUs) and other collaborating institutions offer undergraduate and graduate law programmes, to which CLAT is specifically tailored for admission.The main academic areas of study at Renaissance University include business, management, engineering, science, and humanities.For the majority of its programmes, the institution administers its own entrance tests, which are the Renaissance Management Aptitude Test (RMAT) for postgraduate studies and the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Test for undergraduate programmes. You will not be allowed to use your CLAT score if you would like to pursue law at Renaissance University. The university's undergraduate law programme, requires you to take the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Test.
faqs.question: Does Renaissance University accept CLAT score?

faqs.answer: A:    The common eligibility for Renaissance University is class 12 with 50% for UG courses and Graduation with 50% for PG courses and selection will be merit-based. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: There is no attendance issue, few surprises, and the college life is of good quality.

review_content.Placements: About 40% of students get placed in this course. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Companies such as Kotak, Parle, Bajaj, and OYO visit the college for placements. Roles offered by the companies include Forensic Scientist, Cyber Forensic, and Lab Assistant. Around 50% of students get internships in small forensic companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (Agriculture and Computer Science), and a central library for students. Separate hostels for girls and boys are available. Mess food is hygienic and decent in taste. Canteen food is good. Sports and games tournaments are organized in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good college with good teachers and many events to enjoy.

review_content.Placements: Placement is not so great, but it is good as per the course. Teachers help you prepare for this, and many different companies with a good reputation come here. There are many sessions by motivational speakers from all around the world that guide you to choose your path.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library and other infrastructure are very good. The hostel is not preferable. There are two different gardens and a separate basketball court. There is also a good canteen area where you can enjoy with your friends. Every department has its classes in different buildings.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose Renaissance University?
overview_faqs.answer: Renaissance University has over 20 international collaborations and around 200 faculty members. Renaissance College Indore offers placement assistance to students. The university is visited by top companies for offering placement assistance to students, such as Aditya Birla Group, ICICI Bank, HDFC Ergo, Kotak Mahindra Bank, and others. Choosing this unversity can prove as a great decision for students.

overview_faqs.question: How is the college life of outstation students at Renaissance University?
overview_faqs.answer: The college life of outstation students at Renaissance University is quite good. Renaissance University has a big library with multiple facilities available for students. Renaissance University has a good university environment. The recreational facilities on the campus include a hostel, a gymnasium, a cafeteria, table tennis, a basketball court, a volleyball court, and others. Outstation or not the student life at Renaissance University is quite good.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Com available at Renaissance University, Indore?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BCom is available at Renaissance University. Under this programme, the university offers various specialisations for students to choose from. Tabulated below are the key highlights of this programme.ParticularsStatisticsDurationBCom: Three yearsBCom Hons: Four yearsModeFull timeSelection CriteriaMarks in the qualifying examinationFeeINR 75,000 to INR 1.8 lakhNote: The above information is taken from official sources. However, it is subject to change.

review_summary.college_name: Renaissance University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college for BCA students.

content.Placements: More than 70% of students were placed in college. This helps students to get placed in big companies. More than 60% of students were placed in job roles with an average package of 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA, while the highest package is 23 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very good. Every department of our college is well placed - well organised. Every department is well built and provides every facility, such as Wi-Fi, computers, and so on. The quality of food provided in our college helps students to eat good food.

individual_reviews.course: MBA Core Dual degree - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is absolutely value for money, especially for the college life.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is nice. Approximately 85–90% of students get placements in every session, which is excellent compared to other universities. The packages offered by companies are between 8 and 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ICICI, HDFC, Asian Paints, etc. Most of the roles offered are in Sales.
content.Infrastructure: Everything that needs to be in the college is here in terms of infrastructure and facilities. It includes well-furnished classrooms, a huge library full of books, a canteen, a beautiful garden, and a huge play area. The quality of food in the canteen and in the hostel is also very good. They are maintained with hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: There is no attendance issue, few surprises, and the college life is of good quality.

content.Placements: About 40% of students get placed in this course. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Companies such as Kotak, Parle, Bajaj, and OYO visit the college for placements. Roles offered by the companies include Forensic Scientist, Cyber Forensic, and Lab Assistant. Around 50% of students get internships in small forensic companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college has modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (Agriculture and Computer Science), and a central library for students. Separate hostels for girls and boys are available. Mess food is hygienic and decent in taste. Canteen food is good. Sports and games tournaments are organized in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good college with good teachers and many events to enjoy.

content.Placements: Placement is not so great, but it is good as per the course. Teachers help you prepare for this, and many different companies with a good reputation come here. There are many sessions by motivational speakers from all around the world that guide you to choose your path.
content.Infrastructure: The library and other infrastructure are very good. The hostel is not preferable. There are two different gardens and a separate basketball court. There is also a good canteen area where you can enjoy with your friends. Every department has its classes in different buildings.

individual_reviews.course: MBA Core Dual degree - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: They have a very good library with lots of books & novels.

content.Placements: As per the latest report, more than 300 recruiters participated in Renaissance University annually. The top recruiters of Renaissance University Indore in 2023 included Aditya Birla Group, ICICI Bank, HDFC Ergo, Kotak Mahindra Bank, etc. These recruiters placed students in various sectors with new-age job profiles.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides hostels, which are quite affordable, that is, 6500/month for both girls and boys. The room has two partners, two separate cupboards and attached washrooms. The menu and food quality are average, which should be improved. There is a registration process that depends on the availability and vacancy of hostel rooms.

admission_overview.college_name: Renaissance University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Renaissance University Indore Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Renaissance University offers 25+ undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral degrees, Diplomas, and certificate courses under its 12 schools. The mode of application for all the courses is online/ offline. The university offers courses in various disciplines of Management, Science, Arts, Law, Design, Agriculture, Communication and Journalism, Commerce, and Library Science. The selection of candidates will be based on the merit score of the candidates. For more highlights refer to the table below:
Particulars
Renaissance University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of Study
Regular/Full time
Programmes Offered
25+ courses across multiple specialisations
Admission Status 2025
How to Apply
https://renaissance.ac.in/register-now/
Levels of programmes offered
UG, PG, Diploma and Certificate
Popular Programmes
BSc, MBA/PGDM, BBA, BCom, LLB

The basic eligibility for admission at Renaissance University is merit in the last qualifying examination. UG admissions are granted on basis the of Class 12 merit, whereas a bachelor's degree is considered for PG admissions. PhD candidates must have a master's degree in a relevant discipline. Admission to most of the courses at the university is merit-based. The table below lists the various courses offered at Renaissance University along with their eligibility and Selection:
Course Name
Eligibility
Class 12 with 50% aggregate (Physics and Chemistry, along with Biology/ Mathematics/ Agriculture)
Merit-based
Graduation with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
Class 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
Class 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
Graduation with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
LLB/ BA LLB/ BBA LLB/ BCom LLB with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)
Merit-based
For more detailed information on fees and coursesclick here
The step-wise admission process at RU is given below
Step 1: Renaissance University Admission Process 2025

The first step in the admission process is to fill out the application/ registration form. Candidates can visit the official website to apply for the interested course and after the completion of the form, the last step is to pay the application fee and proceed for submission.
Step 2:Renaissance University Selection Process
The counsellor will call registered students to proceed with admission and documentation verification before considering their enrollment.
Step 3: Renaissance University Enrollment

Candidates who have fulfilled the desired criteria will be considered for admission. The selected students are required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats with respective time/ deadlines. They will be provided with the enrollment number as a confirmation of Admission.

faqs.question: How many students can do MBA at Renaissance University?
faqs.answer: The number  of seats available for MBA differs every year, sometime they may change the number of people can study MBA there, It is better to reach them and get admitted at the earliest so that the students don't miss thier chance studying there .Students must enquire about this as earlier as possible at the universities admission office, at the very beginning of the academic year so that they can get all the details about it .

faqs.question: Can I join Renaissance University directly?
faqs.answer: YES, you can join directly.The university offers direct admission to the MBA programme as well as other UG and PG programs based on merit.Renaissance University's MBA programme typically has requirements for completing specific educational levels and earning a certain amount of marks.The candidate's academic record and the availability of seats determine the selection process.You would have to pay a registration fee and complete an online application in order to apply.Renaissance University's MBA programme offers a range of specializations for final-year students and strives to develop "managerial artists" with strong decision-making abilities, social sensitivity, strategic vision, and flexibility in interpersonal relationships.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility at Renaissance University?
faqs.answer: The common eligibility for Renaissance University is class 12 with 50% for UG courses and Graduation with 50% for PG courses and selection will be merit-based. The eligibility and selection with respective of course is mentioned below:Course NameEligibilitySelectionBScClass 12 with 50% aggregate (Physics and Chemistry, along with Biology/ Mathematics/ Agriculture)Merit-basedMBAGraduation with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-basedBBA (Hons)Class 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-basedBComClass 12 with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-basedLLBGraduation with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-basedLLMLLB/ BA LLB/ BBA LLB/ BCom LLB with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC category)Merit-based

faqs.question: Does Renaissance University accept CLAT score?
faqs.answer: No, Renaissance University does not accept CLAT results for enrollment in any of its courses. National Law Universities (NLUs) and other collaborating institutions offer undergraduate and graduate law programmes, to which CLAT is specifically tailored for admission.The main academic areas of study at Renaissance University include business, management, engineering, science, and humanities.For the majority of its programmes, the institution administers its own entrance tests, which are the Renaissance Management Aptitude Test (RMAT) for postgraduate studies and the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Test for undergraduate programmes. You will not be allowed to use your CLAT score if you would like to pursue law at Renaissance University. The university's undergraduate law programme, requires you to take the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Test.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for B.Com admissions at Renaissance University, Indore?
faqs.answer: Renaissance University Indore makes the selection of students for the BCom courses based on merit in the qualifying examination. In order to get admission, interested candidates must check the eligibility criteria. Those who are eligible can apply for the preferred BCom course via the official website of the university. After the application process, the university prepares a rank list based on the merit in the qualifying examination. The admission committee then shortlists students based on the rank list.

placement_data.title: Renaissance University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Renaissance University has a Training and Placement Department, which is responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The department invites companies from different sectors to conduct the interview process at the Campus premises. The final placements at Renaissance University are a result of a very systematic interaction with the industry and continuous career counselling of the students.

As per the latest report, the highest global package offered during Renaissance University placements 2024 stood at INR 13.20 LPA, whereas the highest national package offered stood at INR 5.75 LPA. The top recruiters of Renaissance University Indore in 2024 included Aditya Birla Group, ICICI Bank, HDFC Ergo, Kotak Mahindra Bank , etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: Renaissance University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball court, Snooker
Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball court, Snooker

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Science laboratory

reviews.review_heading: Good college for BCA students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good. Every department of our college is well placed - well organised. Every department is well built and provides every facility, such as Wi-Fi, computers, and so on. The quality of food provided in our college helps students to eat good food.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely value for money, especially for the college life.
reviews.review_text: Everything that needs to be in the college is here in terms of infrastructure and facilities. It includes well-furnished classrooms, a huge library full of books, a canteen, a beautiful garden, and a huge play area. The quality of food in the canteen and in the hostel is also very good. They are maintained with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: There is no attendance issue, few surprises, and the college life is of good quality.
reviews.review_text: The college has modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (Agriculture and Computer Science), and a central library for students. Separate hostels for girls and boys are available. Mess food is hygienic and decent in taste. Canteen food is good. Sports and games tournaments are organized in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college with good teachers and many events to enjoy.
reviews.review_text: The library and other infrastructure are very good. The hostel is not preferable. There are two different gardens and a separate basketball court. There is also a good canteen area where you can enjoy with your friends. Every department has its classes in different buildings.

reviews.review_heading: They have a very good library with lots of books & novels.
reviews.review_text: The university provides hostels, which are quite affordable, that is, 6500/month for both girls and boys. The room has two partners, two separate cupboards and attached washrooms. The menu and food quality are average, which should be improved. There is a registration process that depends on the availability and vacancy of hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2023-24.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were very good, and their programs were very interesting. The building was very good. Very good infrastructure and a well-maintained college. The buildings were also very good and well-maintained, and the natural infrastructure was very good. The ground was very clean and attractive. Swapnil Sir conducted the programs, and film stars came to our college to motivate us. The canteen was very clean, and Vijay Bhaiya makes very tasty food in college.

reviews.review_heading: Research carefully before taking admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, but there was no focus on the academic syllabus. Wi-Fi facility was available, but not for students. The hostel was below average they actually tied up with local hostels and did not have their own hostels for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Renaissance University is average. Also, they do not have a return on investment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at Renaissance University are a gym, library, swimming pool, cafeteria, canteen, computer lab, science lab, pathology lab, fashion designing lab, placement center, ground, garden, cricket ground, football ground, basketball ground, agriculture lab, pharmacy lab, agriculture area for practices, conference hall, etc. At Renaissance University, there is no hostel for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Things about Renaissance University to know.
reviews.review_text: The college has a library, computer labs, an auditorium, good classrooms, and a canteen. All facilities are accessible to all students. The hostel is average and very close to the college. They have sports and cultural events. There is an annual fest in the college every year.

reviews.review_heading: This is an absolute no!
reviews.review_text: Renaissance University has good infrastructure but the hostels are below average. The library is good but Wi-Fi is not often available. There is a basketball court and a swimming pool that students can use in their free time. The food in the canteen is below average but it is adequate.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is highly supportive, and the curriculum is well-structured to meet industry needs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course is excellent, with well-equipped classrooms, labs, and a library that supports learning. The campus is clean and well-maintained, providing a comfortable environment for studies. The hostel facilities are good, with clean rooms, regular maintenance, and a decent mess. Overall, the infrastructure ensures a smooth academic and living experience.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, facilities, and an affordable fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is all good. Facilities are also good. The hostel infrastructure is good, new buildings are constructed, and the different department has different buildings on campus. There are 2 gyms and 2 libraries and 2 -3 canteens in college. The college has a good campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with skilled, helpful teachers and an attractive campus.
reviews.review_text: Building of this college is very beautiful. Classrooms are completely hygienic, and smart campus has canteen and first aid facilities. Library has a very peaceful atmosphere and is open from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Gym is also available on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Renaissance University Indore Reality.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average, and the infrastructure is old. They are trying to build new infrastructure for the upcoming students. They show AC classrooms during admissions, but they do not have AC classrooms at all. They have a huge library, a training hall, a theatre, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Renaissance University(forensic science).
reviews.review_text: Labs are arranged weekly for our department, and it is a good way of knowing how to handle things in the real world. Classrooms are not bad; they are average. The library, I would say, is pretty good. It is really nice to work on the library, especially during the winters, but during the summers it opens up a lot.

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to the MCA Course is facilitated through the Single Window System. To be eligible, candidates must have completed a Bachelor's Degree with core Mathematics at the class 12 level. Alternatively, they can have studied Mathematics/Statistics as one of the subjects at the degree level. Additionally, candidates must have taken the TANCET Entrance Examination conducted by Anna University, Chennai. Students can select a college based on the rank calculated by their marks in the TANCET. Reservations are provided for BC/MBC/DNC/SC/ST categories, as per the rules of the Government of Tamil Nadu.

review_summary.college_name: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Cyber Security - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am really very satisfied.

content.Placements: Recent year 60-70 percent of students are placed in my college and the salary package is 3 LPA is the lowest and 9 LPA is the highest package offered during this year. Cyber security is recently added course, so no one got internship now, but the other departments are getting jobs if you are good in knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: For each subject, they have separate labs to study about that like Physics, Chemistry, Python, English, and other related fields. Classroom is also very good. Hostel is not maintained properly, I didn't like the hostel because it was not hygienic, but the food is in good condition and made hygienically. Only rooms are bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Cyber Security - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Very satisfied to join this college, except for the hostel.

content.Placements: 80 percent of the students got placed. 9 LPA is the highest package offered. Zoho and TVS are the companies that offer the job. No one now because the course has been available this year. None of the roles offered in cybersecurity now. Many of the companies are there and are taking students for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available inside the campus and in the canteen, which is also inside the campus and provides quality food. They are separate hostels for boys and girls. They are not really worth the hostel because it was an old building.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Business System - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Well-infrastructure and qualified faculty members.

content.Placements: 75% of students got placed in our course. One of the easiest and interesting departments. One of my classmates was placed at Techsible company as an intern and also as a future employee. There are many roles particularly in our course such as business analyst, data scientist, entrepreneur, data analyst, software developer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has our own lab with good working internet and good atmosphere view of classroom including well benches and fans. Hostel is well furnished place. Food quality in canteen and mess is amazing. Every year, a sports day is conducted.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the fee I paid, but I can't vibe around.

content.Placements: Around only 50% of students get placed in the electrical and electronics engineering department. The highest package is around 5 LPA, and the lowest package is around 1.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Techsible, TVS, etc. The top role is Project Manager. Around 60% of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very low compared to other colleges in my city. Infrastructure is average, classrooms are nearly maintained, and the library is very good. Wi-Fi is average. The hostel is the worst, but hostel fees are very high. Hostel food is very hygienic, and rooms are well maintained. Medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I think fee amount is little valuable at Mohamed Sathak Engineering College, Kilakarai.

content.Placements: In EEE, around 40% of students got placed in the ongoing year. The highest salary package offered at Mohamed Sathak Engineering College is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1.2 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA. Internships are bit good. Around 70% of students secured internships in top recruiting companies like TCS, MRF, and Tata Motors.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available in our course is good. There is no network coverage in some of the college places. Library is very large and useful. When it comes to hostel, it has poor infrastructure with poor hostel food. Hostel rooms are not good but average hostel experience.

admission_process.title: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College admission 2025is open. Mohamed Sathak Engineering College offers various courses in the UG and PG levels. Admission to the courses are based on entrance and last qualifying exam. Students who have completed class 12/Diploma may apply forTamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) 2025for BE / BTech programmes admission conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Chennai. The application process atMohamed Sathak Engineering Collegeis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutMohamed Sathak Engineering Collegecourse admission2025.

Mohamed Sathak Engineering course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularMohamed Sathak Engineering courses:

Mohamed Sathak Engineering College admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Mohamed Sathak Engineering College is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College Application Process 2025

The application mode is online or offline. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSEC. The application fee is INR 500. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as TANCET, NATA etc for admission to the MTech, BArch among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theMohamed Sathak Engineering College feeto confirm their seats at the college.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MCA at Mohamed Sathak Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Admission to the MCA Course is facilitated through the Single Window System. To be eligible, candidates must have completed a Bachelor's Degree with core Mathematics at the class 12 level. Alternatively, they can have studied Mathematics/Statistics as one of the subjects at the degree level. Additionally, candidates must have taken the TANCET Entrance Examination conducted by Anna University, Chennai. Students can select a college based on the rank calculated by their marks in the TANCET. Reservations are provided for BC/MBC/DNC/SC/ST categories, as per the rules of the Government of Tamil Nadu.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mohamed Sathak Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I am really very satisfied.
reviews.review_text: For each subject, they have separate labs to study about that like Physics, Chemistry, Python, English, and other related fields. Classroom is also very good. Hostel is not maintained properly, I didn't like the hostel because it was not hygienic, but the food is in good condition and made hygienically. Only rooms are bad.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied to join this college, except for the hostel.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available inside the campus and in the canteen, which is also inside the campus and provides quality food. They are separate hostels for boys and girls. They are not really worth the hostel because it was an old building.

reviews.review_heading: Well-infrastructure and qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our department has our own lab with good working internet and good atmosphere view of classroom including well benches and fans. Hostel is well furnished place. Food quality in canteen and mess is amazing. Every year, a sports day is conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the fee I paid, but I can't vibe around.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very low compared to other colleges in my city. Infrastructure is average, classrooms are nearly maintained, and the library is very good. Wi-Fi is average. The hostel is the worst, but hostel fees are very high. Hostel food is very hygienic, and rooms are well maintained. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I think fee amount is little valuable at Mohamed Sathak Engineering College, Kilakarai.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available in our course is good. There is no network coverage in some of the college places. Library is very large and useful. When it comes to hostel, it has poor infrastructure with poor hostel food. Hostel rooms are not good but average hostel experience.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but no placement.
reviews.review_text: It looks so good about infrastructure, labs are available, classrooms are also okay, but quality staff was not there when I studied. I'm a day scholar, but I had many friends from the hostel. They always told me the food is not good. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The library is available. The food is good. Sports and games are available. Mess food is available for 3times. Milk, tea, and coffee are available in the morning, evening, and night, when all times open in college start from 8.15 to 3.30. Medical facilities are available for emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the infrastructure and attitude of college towards students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi on campus won't be proper. You won't get network inside the classrooms. The hostel available on campus is not good. Since, it was near the coastal area, tap water will be so salty. No proper food is provided nowadays. The college is renovating the old buildings. In college, there is no maintanence of toilets.

reviews.review_heading: I'm totally happy to recommend my college to my cousins, relatives.
reviews.review_text: 24 hour Wi-Fi facility. You can use library for 24 hours. Very excellent lab facility with very good faculty. Separate mess for veg and non veg students with very affordable rate and high quality food. Canteen facility is superb and 24 hour medical facility available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has descent infrastructure and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a good infrastructure as I expected. But it is descent and can be improved. Lab equipment is also decent. The canteen on the campus is the worst. Sports facilities are not provided in college neither there are good opportunities for sportspersons.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and platform to study engineering.
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure and classrooms but the labs are too old. The classrooms are developed in this year for improving the admission and quality of study. But hostel rooms are little bad when compared to classrooms. Lastly the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Crowd and campus life is poor, poor bathroom facility, good faculty members,70% placement in 2019.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite bad as the bathrooms are not properly maintained and the taps don't work. The classrooms are white washed and the classrooms are well ventilated. The corridor is moped regularly and good RO facility is available in every corners. The food is canteen and the hostel is average however air contained hostel block is good and well maintained. Only the labs have Wi-Fi, Library is good, sports, game and medical facility is available!

reviews.review_heading: The college is the best for academics, but there is no fun on the campus.
reviews.review_text: During my tenure at the college, the hostel looked like a haunted place. The infrastructure was very poor. But our new principal is renovating that.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mohamed Sathak Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is enabled with Wi-Fi, and the college is in the second position in handball, in the south zone. The college has a well-ventilated library which consists of books written by famous authors. The advanced survey instruments and the total station are available on the campus. The faculty members taught about the total station. I did not face any issue regarding the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs to try the placement for the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the campus is not bad. In the marine, the classrooms they are showing has the air-conditioned room, but it will not work forever. Rest of the infrastructure is at the basic level. The students can adjust that environment. Wherever we are using water other than the drinking water, and it is directly fed from the sea, which is disgusting.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

For the General category, the Dr. D Y Patil Pratishthan's College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 66.17 and 77.16, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 77.16. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 66.17

Dr. D Y Patil Pratishthan's College of Engineering MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 77.16. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 74.36 in the General category under the HS quota.

reviews.review_heading: Dr. D. Y. Patil Pratishthan's College of Engineering, Salokhenagar, Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: There is strong Wi-Fi across the whole college campus for free. High-tech labs with computer facilities are available. Digital classrooms are available. There is no hostel at our college, but there is a residential area where you can live on rent. It's affordable, and the college management helps to find good rooms, flats, or private hostels. The college has a huge playground and also sports clubs for students who are interested in games.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides well-maintained labs. All labs are fully equipped. Our college has a large ground for students. It has a huge library. It has many books. There is no hostel facility in our college. There are many rooms near our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities are available at the hostel. Our campus is good. The hostel is expensive, but it provides premium facilities for students. The hostel fee is Rs 20,000 per month including mess facilities. The canteen facility is decent.

reviews.review_heading: College has a good infrastructure and they developing the college campus because of.
reviews.review_text: There are two big computer labs with high-speed Wi-Fi, Our branch has a spacious classroom with good ventilation. We have a good organized library also. There is adequate sized sports ground where students can play team sports like football, cricket, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Kolhapur because lots of placement are done.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best facilities like Wi-Fi, all labs, digital classrooms and also the best library. Our college doesn't have a good canteen. Sports are held periodically in the college. Medical facilities are good. We don't have our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are hardworking, which is very helpful for good academic performance.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very attractive. Wi-Fi facilities are available for all the students, and the classrooms are attractive. But sports facilities are very bad here as our college does not provide any sports equipment. Medical facilities are fine. The hostel fee is very expensive, which is more than the college fee. Hostel rooms are not much good. The food served in the canteen is awesome, and you can get food at low costs.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities, and good placement for students.
reviews.review_text: My course was B.Tech in electrical engineering and I am in the second year of engineering. I am so glad to be studying at this college and the highest package is 12 Lacs and the lowest package is 4 Lacs. Our college's top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys and Tech Mahindra.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities with good teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, with good e-classrooms and a library with a lot of knowledge-based collections of books, along with a separate lab for important subjects (Chemistry, Physics, Civil, Electrical). There are separate labs for all the branches.

review_summary.college_name: IMU Mumbai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of India’s best Merchant Navy colleges with high placements and expert faculty.

content.Placements: 97 percent of students of the last batch are placed. Before that, the placement rate is around 96 percent, and before that it is 90–94 percent, so that means it is always increasing. In the Merchant Navy, there is no fixed package; there is a rank-based fixed salary and stipend is different. The stipend in companies like NYK varies between $400–500. In Chevron, it is above $500. In Dyna Gas, it is $1200. In Wallem, it is $500. In BW, it is $600. These are the stipends of a few companies. But after becoming a 4th Engineer, the salary is the same for all, around $800–1500. Companies include NYK, Stena, Chevron, BW, Zodiac, Cell Ship, Wallem, Dyna Gas, Carnival, etc. Almost everyone becomes a 4th Engineer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nautical Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best college I have seen ever in my life.

content.Placements: Placements are very good. According to the previous year’s record, more than 80% got placed. There are a lot of big companies like MOL, Maersk, M.Sc., etc., coming to TMI. Many students from TMI are serving as captains in the merchant navy.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. We have separate classes for every division, equipped with AC. There are computer labs with good internet. The library is also nice. We can also hire books for a few days. The hostel is equipped with Wi-Fi and water coolers, and all the floors have very fast Wi-Fi and lifts.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best maritime college one can opt for.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course is about 95 percent. The highest package offered is 40 LPA, the lowest package offered is around 4.2 LPA, and the average package offered is 28 LPA. Top recruiting companies are MOL, NYK, etc. Roles offered are such as chief engineer, port management, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connectivity is not up to the mark. Classrooms are in good condition. Bathroom conditions are average. The library is good and well furnished. Food in the mess is average. Medical services are not good. Sports and games are one of the best things in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'll rate Tmi as 10/10 because of its placements, best facilities, and experienced faculty.

content.Placements: I'm currently in my 2nd year. I got placed in the 1st year only within the 1st semester. The placements here are top-notch in very reputed companies like Chevron, Torm, Stena, and BW. No concern about placements if you don't have any backlog, you can get placed easily.
content.Infrastructure: Free unlimited Wi-Fi is provided both in classrooms and hostels and in the library. Food quality is excellent and better than that of any other college. A sickbay (medical facilities) is also on the campus with a certified doctor. TMI is known for its events and sports. Every sport like football, cricket, basketball, squash, lawn tennis, table tennis, and various athletic events, is organized.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Tolani Maritime Institute- TMI.

content.Placements: About 98% of students from the current 2024 batch have been placed in top shipping companies such as M.Sc. Wallem Seapeak, etc., with a lot of them having scored an on-board internship of 6 months. Students who did not get an onboard internship will be completing their internship in PVD before they can board their respective ships and start their careers as fourth engineers. The nautical science batch saw a 100% placement rate as of right now.
content.Infrastructure: TMI has provided ethernet connectivity services in each room providing high-speed Wi-Fi, but it does not work sometimes and is switched off after 11 PM every day. The academic block has a workshop that has machines for educational purposes such as late machines, milling machines, shape, etc. It has several labs such as electrical and electronics labs, marine machinery labs, a thermal engineering lab, etc. The campus also has two drawing halls for engineering drawing courses two academic blocks and one block consisting of simulation rooms. The campus has a library which has a wide range of books.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the aura of Tolani Maritime Institute.
reviews.review_text: The Tolani Maritime Institute has a well-equipped library with all the books from the famous writers. The college has full Wi-Fi facility with centralized AC, making the college a more attractive place. The hostels here are all clean and have very good food facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Tolani Maritime Institute- TMIReviewed on 20 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the ambience and the highly knowledgeable faculty of the college
reviews.review_text: There are 100% placements from top-notch companies with full support from all teachers. It is the only college in India with such a good scope of placement in the field of merchant navy that also from reputed international companies. I opted for 3 courses.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Tolani Maritime Institute- TMIReviewed on 20 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: There are a total of 3 hostels and an attachment to H2 is the girls' wing. Hostels are great and provide a very good and hygienic mess. One can only complain about one thing which is washrooms but other than that the hostel services of Tolani are very good.

college_info.college_name: IMU Mumbai Scholarship Details

paragraphs: From the fund, the university awards 5 eligible SC/ST students scholarships worth Rs. 50,000 each. The Indian Maritime University, Chennai-Mumbai awards the scholarships on a semester basis. Students who meet the requirements can apply for a number of scholarships and financial aid programmes offered by Campus MERI.
